results.title: Software Engineer
results.description:
Deloitte provides industry\-leading Technology \& Transformation, Audit \& Assurance, Tax \& Legal and Strategy, Risk \& Transactions services to nearly 90% of the Fortune Global 500® and thousands of private companies.
 



  





 With more than 470,000 professionals worldwide, we work together every day to make an impact that matters — delivering measurable and lasting results that help reinforce public trust in capital markets, enable our clients to transform and thrive, and lead the way toward a stronger economy, a more equitable society, and a more sustainable world.
 



  





 Building on its more than 180 years of history, Deloitte spans more than 150 countries and territories. Our organization has grown significantly in both scale and capabilities; however, our shared culture and mission — to make an impact that matters — remains unchanged. This commitment is evident not only in our work for clients, but also in our WorldClass ambition, our WorldClimate initiative, and our ALL IN diversity and inclusion strategy.
 



  





 Here’s your chance to gain hands\-on business experience among top\-talent professionals in their fields and to build a strong network of colleagues and friends. Get ready to meet people who will challenge your perspective, broaden your horizons, and help you learn about business from a truly global point of view.
 



  





**Want to work on a cloud\-native, Go\-powered backend system from day one?** 




  





 We are looking for a
 **Software Engineer** 
 who is excited about building modern backend services, enjoys working with
 **Golang in cloud\-native environments** 
 , and is ready to take real ownership in production systems.
 



  





 Our goal is to strengthen our delivery capacity with someone who doesn’t just
 *know* 
 the tools, but has
 **used them in real projects** 
 , debugged production issues, and delivered features end to end. This role is backend\-heavy, with a strong focus on building scalable services and APIs, while continuously improving performance, stability, and code quality.
 



  





 In this role, developing services and designing REST APIs using
 **Java and Spring Boot** 
 will be a core responsibility, while
 **actively working with Golang** 
 on cloud\-native components and services. You will be onboarded into Go\-based systems early on and are expected to grow deeper into cloud and infrastructure topics over time. A strong culture of
 **code reviews, engineering standards, and reliable sprint delivery** 
 is central to how the team operates.
 



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, MIS, or a related field
* Proven experience designing and developing RESTful services and REST API architectures
* 2\-4 years of hands\-on experience with Java \& Spring Boot (Spring Data, Security, JPA)
* Practical experience with
 **Golang** 
 , including writing, maintaining, or extending backend services
* Strong experience with MySQL or PostgreSQL and solid SQL fundamentals; basic understanding of database performance concepts
* Experience with cloud and infrastructure fundamentals (preferably AWS; EC2 setup, management, and optimization)
* Experience with
 **Kubernetes** 
 in real projects (deployments, pods, services, configuration concepts)
* Active use of Git with PR and code review workflows; experience with basic testing practices



  





**Must\-Have** 




  




* Proven experience delivering features and bug fixes to
 **production environments**
* Ability to debug complex issues, perform root cause analysis, and close problems end to end
* Strong practical skills in API design (validation, error handling, logging, documentation)
* Real\-world SQL usage (writing queries and understanding indexing fundamentals)
* Comfort with PR discipline (readable code, refactoring, applying review feedback)
* A strong delivery mindset:
 **“I used it, I fixed it, I shipped it”**



  





**Expectations** 




  




* Quickly set up the development environment and adapt to the existing codebase
* Deliver consistently and with quality within sprint cycles, owning tasks end to end
* Take ownership of a module or service and manage the full develop–test–deploy lifecycle
* Contribute to cloud\-native services, actively working with
 **Golang and Kubernetes**
* Improve system performance and stability (query/index optimizations, reducing unnecessary calls, bottleneck analysis)
* Increase test coverage and reduce regression risk, prioritizing critical paths
* Maintain and raise code quality through effective code reviews and contributions to technical debt reduction

results.title: Road to Tech - Staj Programı (3 Ay)
results.description:
🚀 Softtech’le Teknoloji Dünyasına hızlı bir giriş yapabilirsin!
 



  





 🌍 Türkiye’nin öncü teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olarak 2006 yılından bu yana Türkiye ve ABD'de toplam 6 farklı lokasyonda faaliyet göstermekteyiz.
 



  





 🎯 Misyonu, başta Türkiye İş Bankası olmak üzere tüm müşterilerini verimli ve yüksek enerjili ekosistemlerini kullanarak dijital şirketlere dönüştürmektir.
 



  





**Road to Tech Staj Programı ile** 
 teknolojiye yön veren, global çapta ödüllerin sahibi olan çevik ekiplerin parçası olarak çalışma fırsatı yakalarsın. Birlikte gelişmenin gücüne inanıyor ve gençler için tasarladığımız
 **Pupilica Dijital Eğitim Platformumuza** 
 bu yoldaki en büyük destekçin olarak her zaman erişebilirsin.
 



  





**Seni Neler Bekliyor?** 




  




* Öğrenme ve gelişim fırsatlarıyla dolu çevik bir çalışma ortamı
* Teknoloji kariyerinde gerçek projeleri deneyimle imkanı
* Dijital eğitim platformu ile yetkinliklerini geliştirme fırsatı



  





 Bu yolculukta öğrendiklerinden daha fazlasını öğrenebilir, kendini geliştirebilirsin.
 



  





**Başvuru ve Katılım Şartları** 




  




* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinde 3\. Sınıf veya 4\. Sınıf öğrencisiysen,
* 3 ay boyunca (Haziran\- Eylül 2026 arasında) haftada en az 3 gün staj yapabiliyorsan,
* Teknolojiye yön veren ekiplerin parçası olmak istiyorsan,
* Çevik çalışma dünyasında yer almaktan heyecan duyuyorsan,
* Öğrenme dünyasının merkezinde olmak ve kendini teknoloji alanında geliştirmek istiyorsan sen de başvurunu yapabilirsin!



  





**Değerlendirme Süreci** 




  





 Başvurun detaylı olarak incelendikten sonra belirlenen kriterlere uyum sağlıyorsan;
 


* İlk adım olarak
 **Pupilica** 
 'dan yönlendireceğimiz eğitimi tamamlamanı bekleyeceğiz.
* Sonraki adımımız olan
 **Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni** 
 göndereceğiz.
* Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni başarıyla tamamlayarak adımı geçtiğinde
 **Öğrenme Çevikliği Envanteri** 
 ile sürecimizle devam ediyoruz.
* Son olarak
 **hem yetkinlik bazlı hem de teknik görüşme** 
 adımına geçerek sürecini tamamlayabileceksin.

results.title: Insider One - Future Devs Internship Program
results.description:
Before jumping into all the information about the role and what you can bring to the table, let us introduce ourselves real quick.
   

  

**About Us**
 Insider One is the
 **\#1 platform** 
 that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and
 **become unstoppable.**
 Our story began with six desks and a vision to create a single platform to make industry\-first technologies and emerging channels accessible to marketers worldwide. Today, Insider One is powered
 **by 1,500\+ team members representing 50\+ nationalities across 30\+ offices** 
 . With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP),
 **Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels** 
 , including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search.
   

  

 We recently raised one of the largest funding rounds in the industry,
 **a $500M Series E led by General Atlantic** 
 . We are backed by top\-notch investors, including
 **Sequoia Capital, QIA, Riverwood, and Endeavor Catalyst** 
 , and trusted by 2000\+ customers from high\-growth startups to the most prestigious Fortune 500 companies such as Samsung, Nike, L’Oreal, Singapore Airlines, Nestlé, Nissan, Lenovo, Puma, IKEA, Allianz, Domino's, and the list goes on.
   

  

 Insider One was congratulated for becoming one of the only
 **woman\-founded, women\-led B2B SaaS unicorns** 
 in the world. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts,
 **we are the only vendor recognized as the \#1 leader** 
 in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need. Don’t just take our word for it — see for yourself. We consistently outperform and continue our leadership, and the results speak for themselves.
   

  

 From day one, Insider One’s mission has not only been to build a world\-class product company, but also to create one of the
 **most socially progressive technology communities** 
 in the world. Through our social responsibility initiatives like
 *100 Social Responsibility Projects, AI Training for Teachers, Code Academy, SheCodes, SheLeads, and SheMarkables* 
 , our community has committed to scaling its impact on our communities across 30\+ countries, driving initiatives in health, education, farming, animal rights, and increasing women’s representation in STEM.
   

  

 Behind all these achievements is
 **an exceptionally talented, visionary team of overachievers** 
 that moves fast and agile, creating cutting\-edge products, and focuses on making an impact. If you want to be a part of this journey, just keep reading.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Contribute to real production systems used by global customers
* Design and implement APIs, services, and application components (backend and/or frontend)
* Collaborate closely with senior engineers and learn modern software architecture hands\-on
* Participate in agile ceremonies, technical discussions, and code reviews
* Take ownership of features and ship them end\-to\-end
* Work on scalable, high\-availability systems and understand how real\-world products operate
* Improve system performance, reliability, and maintainability
* Continuously level up your technical and problem\-solving skills through mentorship and feedback
* This isn’t a simulation
* You won’t be solving toy problems
* You’ll be building systems that matter


**What You Will Gain**
* Real production experience before graduation
* 1:1 mentorship from experienced engineers
* Exposure to scalable architectures and cloud environments
* A strong engineering foundation that differentiates you in the job market
* The opportunity to convert to a full\-time Software Engineer position based on your performance
* Many of our strongest engineers started their journey through this program


**What You Will Need**
* Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field
* Hands\-on experience in at least one programming language (Go, Java, Python, PHP, JavaScript, etc.)
* Basic understanding of databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, or similar)
* Familiarity with algorithms, data structures, and fundamental software principles
* Experience with Git or version control systems
* Curiosity, ownership mindset, and a strong desire to grow
* A passion for writing clean, maintainable code
* If you’ve worked on personal projects, contributed to open\-source, or have a GitHub portfolio
* If you’ve participated in hackathons, tech communities, or coding competitions


**Why Join Insider One?**
* Because your first step into tech should be meaningful
* Because you deserve to build, not just observe
* Because your career deserves a strong start
* If you’re ambitious, curious, and ready to grow fast — we’re ready for you


***We expect our interns to join us full\-time throughout the summer and continue contributing at least three days per week during the academic year.***
 Thanks for stopping by our stand and taking the time to connect with us.
   

  

 We believe careers are built through curiosity, learning, and meaningful connections — and this is just the beginning.
   

  

 Looking forward to staying in touch. 🚀
   

  

 We provide equal opportunity in a zero\-discrimination workplace and not just welcome but also embrace everyone without regard to sex, race, color, nationality, religion, gender identity, sexual orientation, disability status, citizenship, or marital status.
   

  

 Please follow Insider One on LinkedIn, Instagram, X, Facebook and Medium!
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

results.title: Junior Java Developer
results.description:
**About the Job** 




  





**Company Description** 




 OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI\-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e\-commerce, retail, and the start\-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a
 **Java Developer** 
 to join us and contribute to building high\-quality, end\-to\-end solutions that create real business impact.
 



  





 As a Java Developer at OBSS, you will work on diverse, large\-scale projects to design, build, and maintain innovative software solutions. You will collaborate with cross\-functional teams to develop RESTful APIs, create scalable architectures, and ensure high coding standards that support mission\-critical systems.
 



  





**Main Responsibilities** 



* Develop, test, and maintain Java applications in line with project requirements.
* Contribute to the design and implementation of RESTful APIs.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\-documented code.
* Participate in code reviews and follow established coding standards.
* Support troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving software defects.
* Collaborate with team members to analyze requirements and deliver solutions.
* Stay up to date with emerging technologies and continuously improve technical skills.



  





**Qualifications / Technical Skills** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering or a related field.
* 1–2 years of hands\-on experience in Java development.
* Solid understanding of Java and object\-oriented programming concepts.
* Familiarity with the Spring Framework (Spring Boot preferred).
* Experience with RESTful services and basic SQL queries.
* Awareness of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript is a plus.
* Experience with version control tools (Git).
* Willingness to learn CI/CD tools, testing frameworks, and software development practices.
* Strong problem\-solving, analytical thinking, and communication skills.
* Team player with motivation to grow in a professional environment.



  





**Additional Informations :** 




  





**Professional Growth \& Learning** 




 As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement.
 



  





**Company Culture and Values** 




 We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued.
 



  





**Benefits and Perks** 




 We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

results.title: Junior Software Development Engineer (C#) / TIA Portal
results.description:
We are the catalyst for the industrial world’s digital transformation.
   

  

 For more than 35 years, ground breaking technologies and business models engineered and developed by Siemens Turkey R\&D department contributes to the global success of Siemens
   

  

 Our R\&D activities focused on the fields of electrification, automation and digitalization, provides end\-to\-end support to our global customers on their unique digital transformation journey.
   

  

 We aim to increase our strength on solution and product development with world class SW development experts, with the vision to be the digitalization partner for our global customers.
   

  

 We need game changers like you, to bring the next level of smart manufacturing and infrastructure from mere concept to reality, develop tomorrow’s smart cities, and address the most critical digitalization challenges across a comprehensive range of industries.
   

  

**What are my responsibilities?**
* Software development activities (design, analysis, implementation, testing) for TIA Portal application
* Conforming to Siemens processes, quality standards and guidelines
* Working in an agile, flexible and international software development environment


**What do I need to qualify for this job?**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, software engineering, or similar
* Excellent command of English
* Less than 4 years of experience in a software development
* Proficiency and hands\-on experience with C\#
* Solid understanding and application of OOP principles, analysis, and design
* Commitment to following development best practices and crafting high\-quality, maintainable code
* Hard\-working, result oriented team player, enthusiastic and eager to learn
* Knowledge and experience of source control tools is a plus (e.g. Azure DevOps, Git, etc.)
* Collaborating effectively within an Agile (Scrum) development team
* Motivated to use AI development tools, such as GitHub Copilot, for enhanced productivity and continuous learning
* Being suitable for hybrid working model
* No restrictions for travelling


**What We Offer?**
* Speaking up Culture
* Respectful Workplace
* Being part of a global work environment
* Attractive remuneration package
* Excellent recognition tools providing spot awards
* Learning \& Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth
* Leave days for parents and a variety of flexible working models that allow time off for yourself and your family
* Creche allowance for mothers
* Share matching programs to become a shareholder of Siemens AG
* Remote working and remote living flexibility only for relevant positions
* Find more benefits here


*Individual benefits are adapted to meet local legal regulations, the requirements of different job profiles, locations, and individual preferences.*
 At Siemens we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow ‘s reality.
   

  

 As Siemens we believe physical barriers are not related to potential. Only the potential matters to us. Therefore, we look forward to receiving applications from candidates with physical barriers and chronic illnesses. We support healthy relationships between candidates with barriers and their colleagues because we believe we can create differences together.
   

  

 Siemens is dedicated to quality, equality, and valuating diversity and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities within which we work.
   

  

 We are looking forward to receiving your online application. Please ensure you complete all areas of the application form to the best of your ability as we will use the data to review your suitability for the role.
   

  

 Please find more information from our web site:
   

  

 https://new.siemens.com/tr/tr.html

results.title: Jr Software Engineer
results.description:
**Job Overview**
 Join Mindsite as a Junior Software Engineer and contribute to the growth and scalability of our data platform. Ideal for professionals eager to gain hands\-on experience in building and maintaining web applications, ensuring data accuracy, and supporting real\-time data operations across multiple websites.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Up to 1 year of experience in software development or related fields.
* Familiarity with Python for web scraping, crawling, and data processing tasks.
* Basic understanding of SQL for analyzing and validating data.
* Experience working with APIs for data integration and real\-time synchronization.
* Interest in web application development and adapting new platforms to internal systems.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to ensuring data accuracy.
* Ability to work in remote, collaborative, and fast\-paced environments.
* Eagerness to learn, take ownership, and grow within a dynamic team.


**In This Role, You Will**
* Support the onboarding of 650\+ web applications into Mindsite’s platform, ensuring smooth integration and maintenance.
* Assist in crawling, scraping, and validating data from multiple websites.
* Perform SQL data analysis to confirm data consistency and quality.
* Work with APIs to synchronize data in real time across our systems.
* Collaborate with senior engineers to implement best practices and improve platform performance.
* Contribute to problem\-solving discussions and suggest improvements in workflows.
* Continuously learn new tools and techniques to strengthen the platform and your skills.


**What We Offer**
* Competitive Compensation: Salary indexed to foreign currency rates, plus performance\-based bonuses.
* Flexible Benefits: Health insurance, Apple devices, meal cards, therapy \& wellness reimbursements, and more.
* Time Off That Respects You: 10\+ vacation days plus your birthday off.
* A Culture That Builds Leaders: Join a driven, collaborative team shaping the future of e\-commerce with industry leaders like P , Unilever, and Colgate\-Palmolive.
* Endless Learning Opportunities: Stay on top of industry trends and sharpen your skills with continuous learning support.
* Fully Remote Work: The freedom to work from wherever you are most productive.


**About Mindsite**
 Mindsite is a fast\-growing SaaS company helping brands win online through actionable e\-commerce analytics. From product availability and pricing to visibility and sentiment, we empower leading FMCG players with insights that fuel growth.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? We can’t wait to see what you bring!

results.title: Software Engineer, Games (New Grad)
results.description:
We are looking for a recent graduate Software Engineer to join our Engineering Team. Together with your team, you will be crafting code that brings to life game features, items and levels in our games which are enjoyed by a community of over 40 million monthly active players. This scale comes along with very interesting engineering challenges which we solve together, using a technology\-agnostic approach. Alongside with our games, we continue to grow as software engineers and as a team.
 



  





**Here’s what you'll do** 




  




* Build an amazing experience for the millions of users who play every day
* Design, implement, test and maintain our casual gaming products
* Write clean, sustainable code and participate in peer code\-reviews
* You will have ownership of a primary work stream, which you will own end\-to\-end, but you'll also work in close collaboration with your fellow mobile engineers
* Brainstorm new ideas together with your team to continuously iterate and improve our games' user experience



  





**Desired skills and experiences** 




  




* University degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or any equivalent subject
* Having game projects in Unity is an advantage
* There’s no need to have prior game development experience. If you are an engineer and value a holistic and technology\-agnostic approach to software engineering, we’d like to hear from you!



  





**What you’ll learn in this role** 




  




* How to develop, release and maintain high quality code
* Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals
* A good command of various programming languages (such as C\#, Java) and hands\-on experience of best practices and idioms of these languages
* Software architecture design, OOP, and design patterns and principles on various scales



  





**Working at Peak** 




  




* Fast\-paced environment with a tight\-knit and collaborative culture
* Never\-ending learning and development opportunities
* Relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends
* Team events and trips
* We support your personal and professional development with challenging projects and regular feedback
* Full health benefits

results.title: Software Engineer (New Grad)
results.description:
We are looking for a passionate new grad to join our team as a Software Engineer. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to all areas of game development, including programming graphics, game logic, and user interface using Unity. It is not required to have prior game development experience since we believe a competent software engineer can develop great things in any field. You will work effectively as part of a multi\-disciplinary team of engineers, artists, and game designers to create games that will be played by millions of people all around the world.
 



  





 At Dream Games, all team members have a genuine chance to contribute to the final product and have an impact on the company. If you want to be a team member of a fast\-growing company, you might be the person we are looking for!
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* Designing, implementing, and testing game features
* Delivering well\-structured code and participating in code\-review sessions
* Creating flexible code that can be easily updated as the product evolves
* Contributing to the improvement of user experience in the games



  





**Requirements** 




  




* Fresh graduate from the field of Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or Software Engineering
* Knowledge of Object\-Oriented Programming
* Interest in Unity and C\#
* Passion and interest in games
* Appreciation and understanding of teamwork



  





**Compensation \& Benefits** 




  




* Monthly net salary is 300\.000 TL
* Health, dental, and vision insurance with %100 coverage
* Relocation support as needed

results.title: Front-End Web Developer
results.description:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Front\-End Web Developer in Turkey.**
 This role offers the opportunity to design and build dynamic, user\-friendly web interfaces that bridge the gap between visual design and functional implementation. The Front\-End Developer will work on both public\-facing websites and internal tools, contributing to a wide range of projects in a remote\-first, globally distributed environment. This position emphasizes collaboration with designers, developers, and stakeholders to deliver seamless, high\-performance applications using frameworks like React and Angular. You will be involved in translating wireframes into reusable, maintainable code, optimizing performance, and ensuring a consistent and engaging user experience. The role provides autonomy, creative input, and exposure to evolving architectures in a culture focused on innovation, quality, and continuous learning.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Develop new user\-facing features and translate design wireframes into functional, visually appealing code
* Build reusable components and ensure code quality, maintainability, and scalability across projects
* Collaborate closely with designers, developers, and other teams to bridge design and technical implementation
* Optimize application performance, ensuring fast, responsive, and consistent user experiences
* Support internal UI tools and back\-office interfaces to improve operational workflows
* Contribute to website optimization, SEO adherence, and technical best practices for front\-end development
* Maintain alignment with evolving architectural standards and development frameworks


**Requirements**
* Proven experience with modern front\-end frameworks, especially React and Angular
* Strong skills in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML, CSS, and Tailwind, with solid understanding of SPA, SSG, and asynchronous request handling
* Experience with server\-side CSS pre\-processing and code versioning tools such as GitHub
* Familiarity with UI/UX principles, responsive design, and cross\-browser compatibility
* Experience with automated testing frameworks like Cypress or Playwright is a plus
* Strong communication skills and ability to collaborate in a remote, distributed team
* Dedicated workspace and reliable high\-speed internet connection
* Optional: familiarity with Figma, Lokalise, and front\-end security best practices


**Benefits**
* Fully remote, work\-from\-anywhere position with flexible schedule and PTO plan
* Opportunity to shape impactful web experiences that reach global users
* Professional development budget for conferences, courses, and learning resources
* Collaborative, high\-performance, globally distributed team environment
* Emphasis on work\-life balance and autonomy in day\-to\-day responsibilities
* Exposure to cutting\-edge front\-end technologies and evolving web architectures


 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 We use an AI\-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

 will be a core responsibility, while
 **actively working with Golang** 
 on cloud\-native components and services. You will be onboarded into Go\-based systems early on and are expected to grow deeper into cloud and infrastructure topics over time. A strong culture of
 **code reviews, engineering standards, and reliable sprint delivery** 
 is central to how the team operates.
 



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, MIS, or a related field
* Proven experience designing and developing RESTful services and REST API architectures
* 2\-4 years of hands\-on experience with Java \& Spring Boot (Spring Data, Security, JPA)
* Practical experience with
 **Golang** 
 , including writing, maintaining, or extending backend services
* Strong experience with MySQL or PostgreSQL and solid SQL fundamentals; basic understanding of database performance concepts
* Experience with cloud and infrastructure fundamentals (preferably AWS; EC2 setup, management, and optimization)
* Experience with
 **Kubernetes** 
 in real projects (deployments, pods, services, configuration concepts)
* Active use of Git with PR and code review workflows; experience with basic testing practices



  





**Must\-Have** 




  




* Proven experience delivering features and bug fixes to
 **production environments**
* Ability to debug complex issues, perform root cause analysis, and close problems end to end
* Strong practical skills in API design (validation, error handling, logging, documentation)
* Real\-world SQL usage (writing queries and understanding indexing fundamentals)
* Comfort with PR discipline (readable code, refactoring, applying review feedback)
* A strong delivery mindset:
 **“I used it, I fixed it, I shipped it”**



  





**Expectations** 




  




* Quickly set up the development environment and adapt to the existing codebase
* Deliver consistently and with quality within sprint cycles, owning tasks end to end
* Take ownership of a module or service and manage the full develop–test–deploy lifecycle
* Contribute to cloud\-native services, actively working with
 **Golang and Kubernetes**
* Improve system performance and stability (query/index optimizations, reducing unnecessary calls, bottleneck analysis)
* Increase test coverage and reduce regression risk, prioritizing critical paths
* Maintain and raise code quality through effective code reviews and contributions to technical debt reduction

results.title: Road to Tech - Staj Programı (3 Ay)
results.description:
🚀 Softtech’le Teknoloji Dünyasına hızlı bir giriş yapabilirsin!
 



  





 🌍 Türkiye’nin öncü teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olarak 2006 yılından bu yana Türkiye ve ABD'de toplam 6 farklı lokasyonda faaliyet göstermekteyiz.
 



  





 🎯 Misyonu, başta Türkiye İş Bankası olmak üzere tüm müşterilerini verimli ve yüksek enerjili ekosistemlerini kullanarak dijital şirketlere dönüştürmektir.
 



  





**Road to Tech Staj Programı ile** 
 teknolojiye yön veren, global çapta ödüllerin sahibi olan çevik ekiplerin parçası olarak çalışma fırsatı yakalarsın. Birlikte gelişmenin gücüne inanıyor ve gençler için tasarladığımız
 **Pupilica Dijital Eğitim Platformumuza** 
 bu yoldaki en büyük destekçin olarak her zaman erişebilirsin.
 



  





**Seni Neler Bekliyor?** 




  




* Öğrenme ve gelişim fırsatlarıyla dolu çevik bir çalışma ortamı
* Teknoloji kariyerinde gerçek projeleri deneyimle imkanı
* Dijital eğitim platformu ile yetkinliklerini geliştirme fırsatı



  





 Bu yolculukta öğrendiklerinden daha fazlasını öğrenebilir, kendini geliştirebilirsin.
 



  





**Başvuru ve Katılım Şartları** 




  




* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinde 3\. Sınıf veya 4\. Sınıf öğrencisiysen,
* 3 ay boyunca (Haziran\- Eylül 2026 arasında) haftada en az 3 gün staj yapabiliyorsan,
* Teknolojiye yön veren ekiplerin parçası olmak istiyorsan,
* Çevik çalışma dünyasında yer almaktan heyecan duyuyorsan,
* Öğrenme dünyasının merkezinde olmak ve kendini teknoloji alanında geliştirmek istiyorsan sen de başvurunu yapabilirsin!



  





**Değerlendirme Süreci** 




  





 Başvurun detaylı olarak incelendikten sonra belirlenen kriterlere uyum sağlıyorsan;
 


* İlk adım olarak
 **Pupilica** 
 'dan yönlendireceğimiz eğitimi tamamlamanı bekleyeceğiz.
* Sonraki adımımız olan
 **Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni** 
 göndereceğiz.
* Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni başarıyla tamamlayarak adımı geçtiğinde
 **Öğrenme Çevikliği Envanteri** 
 ile sürecimizle devam ediyoruz.
* Son olarak
 **hem yetkinlik bazlı hem de teknik görüşme** 
 adımına geçerek sürecini tamamlayabileceksin.

results.title: Software Engineer, Fullstack (New Grad)
results.description:
**About Codeway**
 Codeway is a global consumer tech company with more than 400M users worldwide.
   

  

 Since 2020, we’ve built and scaled 60\+ mobile apps across creativity, productivity, wellness, language learning, and entertainment.
   

  

 Our flagship apps — Retake AI, Cleanup, Learna, and DramaPops — and many of them lead their categories globally. In 2024, we became the most downloaded app publisher on iOS, driven by cutting\-edge AI research, sharp data\-driven execution, and a relentless focus on product and marketing.
   

  

 We’re a team of 300\+ people across İstanbul and Barcelona who bring curiosity, passion, trust, and ownership to everything we build. Recognized as a \#1 LinkedIn Top Startup and a Great Place to Work in Europe, Codeway is where ambitious people do their life’s best work.
   

  

 We’re building the next generation of consumer tech and reimagining what mobile apps can be.
   

  

 This is Codeway. This is our way. Join us.
   

  

 POSITION
   

  

 We are looking for a Software Engineer, Fullstack to join our team.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer, Fullstack, you will work on web projects across both back\-end and front\-end.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Analyze and deliver features. Analyze, implement, and deliver new features while monitoring and maintaining to offer high\-quality software solutions.
* Own your work end\-to\-end. Take full accountability for your work, from start to finish, by identifying any issues and improving our products.
* Stay curious and improve continuously. Maintain a sense of curiosity regarding emerging technologies and trends in the industry, continuously improving your technical skills and knowledge.
* Ensure code quality. Engage in code reviews to guarantee code quality, performance, and compliance with coding standards.
* Raise company\-wide standards. Recognize challenges that affect the entire company and strive to elevate the quality standards organization\-wide.


**What You’ll Bring**
* B.Sc. in Computer Science or a similar discipline.
* Experience with NodeJS.
* Experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, as well as frameworks like Vue or React.
* Experience with designing and implementing RESTful APIs.
* Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).
* Knowledge of unit/integration testing.
* Good communication and collaboration skills in English, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.


 NICE TO HAVE
   

  

 Experience in relevant Google Cloud Products (e.g., Pub/Sub, Functions, App Engine)
   

  

 Experience with Vue3 and Firestore
   

  

 Experience with caching strategies (e.g., Redis, Memcached)
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Great Place to Work. As our top team member, you'll be a part of a fast\-growing startup and have the privilege to enjoy our accredited “BEST WORKPLACES” environment, ranked first among all workplaces.
* A Competitive Compensation Package. Long story short, we take care of you.
* A Meal Compensation. That is actually enough for a decent \& nutritious lunch, we’re not following the industry standard.
* Full Health Benefits. To keep you away from all the trouble, we provide unlimited private health insurance and cover the HPV vaccine.
* Pet Adoption Support. We cover the primary healthcare expenses, parasite vaccinations, and microchip costs that may arise within the first year after employees adopt a pet.
* Cool Tech Stack. Macbook, iPhone 15 Pro, magic mouse, magic keyboard; an adjustable desk with a 4K screen and any other gadget you may need in your job.
* Sport Activities Support. We care about your physical wellbeing and support your gym membership.
* Learning Never Ends! Training budget to help you grow in your role, gain new skills, and learn new things.
* Udemy Free Pass. An unlimited Udemy subscription.
* Flexible Schedule \& Unlimited Vacations. This isn’t a “clock in, clock out” company. We care about your productivity, not tracking every minute you’re on site. It’s up to you to always be responsible with your work, no matter where you are or what schedule you’re keeping.
* English Course Support. Be more global and perform best at your work.
* Comprehensive Well\-being Support. Through our partnership with Meditopia, we now offer free psychological counseling, along with additional services like dietitian, personal trainer, parenting consultant, physiotherapist, child \& adolescent therapist, and face\-to\-face counseling for employees in Istanbul.
* A Top\-Notch Office. Located at the heart of Istanbul, right next to Levent Metro Station at Ferko Signature.
* Codebrew. Yes, you’ve heard it right: We love coffee so much that we’ve built our own coffee shop inside our office, where we also provide healthy snacks at certain hours.
* Free Breakfast. At Codebrew \- every morning at 9:30 AM.
* No Dress Code. Dress as you like.
* Happy Hours Every Friday. Every. Single. Friday. When it’s 5 PM: Screens off, party on! (Check out Codeway on Instagram)
* Dream Team. Average Codeway member is young, talented, and passionate \- which makes our working environment extremely dynamic. Need proof? Take a look at our Instagram.
* Gaming Area. Whenever you need to take a break from hard work and relax with your favorite games, our PS5 corner will be waiting for you.
* Software Support. Subscription to any software you might need to perform at your best.
* Public Transportation Support. Daily public transportation support is on us, covered by an additional monthly compensation.
* Parent Support. Becoming a parent is a big moment, and Codeway celebrates it with you. We offer a one\-time grant to support our new parents.
* Massage Room. When you need a moment to recharge and unwind, our massage chair room will be ready to offer you a relaxing break.


 THE RECRUITING PROCESS
   

  

 We are committed to keeping our recruitment process short and transparent. Here’s how it looks like:
   

  

  

* Application: Send us your CV or LinkedIn profile. You can also just write a few words about yourself.
* Case Study: We might send you a task to solve.
* Talent \& Culture Interview: Let’s talk about your experience \& expectations and see what we can achieve together.
* Technical Interview: You will meet with future team lead to go over the case and your technical capabilities in detail.
* Reference Check: We will contact your references to gain insights into your past experiences and work ethic.
* Welcome Aboard! You are now a part of the team.


*Your personal data that will be collected through your applications made due to this advertisement will be processed automatically by the data controller Codeway in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") and relevant legislation for the purpose of conducting job application processes. You can access detailed information on this matter from the
 **"Candidate Information Notice"** 
 page at* 
*https://www.codeway.co* 
*. Codeway processes the personal data of job applicants in accordance with relevant legislation. "
 **Privacy Notice for Employee Candidate***
 "
 *summarizes the data processing procedures during the application process.*
*Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu Codeway tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye* 
*https://www.codeway.co* 
*adresindeki* 
***"Aday Aydınlatma Metnimizin"***
*sayfasından ulaşabilirsiniz. Codeway, iş başvurusu yapan adayların kişisel verilerini, ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde işlemektedir.
 **"Çalışan Adayı İçin Gizlilik Bildirimi"** 
 başvuru sürecindeki veri işleme süreçlerini özetler.*
 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

results.title: Junior Software Development Engineer (C#) / TIA Portal
results.description:
We are the catalyst for the industrial world’s digital transformation.
   

  

 For more than 35 years, ground breaking technologies and business models engineered and developed by Siemens Turkey R\&D department contributes to the global success of Siemens
   

  

 Our R\&D activities focused on the fields of electrification, automation and digitalization, provides end\-to\-end support to our global customers on their unique digital transformation journey.
   

  

 We aim to increase our strength on solution and product development with world class SW development experts, with the vision to be the digitalization partner for our global customers.
   

  

 We need game changers like you, to bring the next level of smart manufacturing and infrastructure from mere concept to reality, develop tomorrow’s smart cities, and address the most critical digitalization challenges across a comprehensive range of industries.
   

  

**What are my responsibilities?**
* Software development activities (design, analysis, implementation, testing) for TIA Portal application
* Conforming to Siemens processes, quality standards and guidelines
* Working in an agile, flexible and international software development environment


**What do I need to qualify for this job?**
* Bachelor’s degree in computer engineering, software engineering, or similar
* Excellent command of English
* Less than 4 years of experience in a software development
* Proficiency and hands\-on experience with C\#
* Solid understanding and application of OOP principles, analysis, and design
* Commitment to following development best practices and crafting high\-quality, maintainable code
* Hard\-working, result oriented team player, enthusiastic and eager to learn
* Knowledge and experience of source control tools is a plus (e.g. Azure DevOps, Git, etc.)
* Collaborating effectively within an Agile (Scrum) development team
* Motivated to use AI development tools, such as GitHub Copilot, for enhanced productivity and continuous learning
* Being suitable for hybrid working model
* No restrictions for travelling


**What We Offer?**
* Speaking up Culture
* Respectful Workplace
* Being part of a global work environment
* Attractive remuneration package
* Excellent recognition tools providing spot awards
* Learning \& Development opportunities for both personal and professional growth
* Leave days for parents and a variety of flexible working models that allow time off for yourself and your family
* Creche allowance for mothers
* Share matching programs to become a shareholder of Siemens AG
* Remote working and remote living flexibility only for relevant positions
* Find more benefits here


*Individual benefits are adapted to meet local legal regulations, the requirements of different job profiles, locations, and individual preferences.*
 At Siemens we are always challenging ourselves to build a better future. We need the most innovative and diverse Digital Minds to develop tomorrow ‘s reality.
   

  

 As Siemens we believe physical barriers are not related to potential. Only the potential matters to us. Therefore, we look forward to receiving applications from candidates with physical barriers and chronic illnesses. We support healthy relationships between candidates with barriers and their colleagues because we believe we can create differences together.
   

  

 Siemens is dedicated to quality, equality, and valuating diversity and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities within which we work.
   

  

 We are looking forward to receiving your online application. Please ensure you complete all areas of the application form to the best of your ability as we will use the data to review your suitability for the role.
   

  

 Please find more information from our web site:
   

  

 https://new.siemens.com/tr/tr.html

results.title: Jr Software Engineer
results.description:
**Job Overview**
 Join Mindsite as a Junior Software Engineer and contribute to the growth and scalability of our data platform. Ideal for professionals eager to gain hands\-on experience in building and maintaining web applications, ensuring data accuracy, and supporting real\-time data operations across multiple websites.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Up to 1 year of experience in software development or related fields.
* Familiarity with Python for web scraping, crawling, and data processing tasks.
* Basic understanding of SQL for analyzing and validating data.
* Experience working with APIs for data integration and real\-time synchronization.
* Interest in web application development and adapting new platforms to internal systems.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to ensuring data accuracy.
* Ability to work in remote, collaborative, and fast\-paced environments.
* Eagerness to learn, take ownership, and grow within a dynamic team.


**In This Role, You Will**
* Support the onboarding of 650\+ web applications into Mindsite’s platform, ensuring smooth integration and maintenance.
* Assist in crawling, scraping, and validating data from multiple websites.
* Perform SQL data analysis to confirm data consistency and quality.
* Work with APIs to synchronize data in real time across our systems.
* Collaborate with senior engineers to implement best practices and improve platform performance.
* Contribute to problem\-solving discussions and suggest improvements in workflows.
* Continuously learn new tools and techniques to strengthen the platform and your skills.


**What We Offer**
* Competitive Compensation: Salary indexed to foreign currency rates, plus performance\-based bonuses.
* Flexible Benefits: Health insurance, Apple devices, meal cards, therapy \& wellness reimbursements, and more.
* Time Off That Respects You: 10\+ vacation days plus your birthday off.
* A Culture That Builds Leaders: Join a driven, collaborative team shaping the future of e\-commerce with industry leaders like P , Unilever, and Colgate\-Palmolive.
* Endless Learning Opportunities: Stay on top of industry trends and sharpen your skills with continuous learning support.
* Fully Remote Work: The freedom to work from wherever you are most productive.


**About Mindsite**
 Mindsite is a fast\-growing SaaS company helping brands win online through actionable e\-commerce analytics. From product availability and pricing to visibility and sentiment, we empower leading FMCG players with insights that fuel growth.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? We can’t wait to see what you bring!

results.title: Software Engineer, Games (New Grad)
results.description:
We are looking for a recent graduate Software Engineer to join our Engineering Team. Together with your team, you will be crafting code that brings to life game features, items and levels in our games which are enjoyed by a community of over 40 million monthly active players. This scale comes along with very interesting engineering challenges which we solve together, using a technology\-agnostic approach. Alongside with our games, we continue to grow as software engineers and as a team.
 



  





**Here’s what you'll do** 




  




* Build an amazing experience for the millions of users who play every day
* Design, implement, test and maintain our casual gaming products
* Write clean, sustainable code and participate in peer code\-reviews
* You will have ownership of a primary work stream, which you will own end\-to\-end, but you'll also work in close collaboration with your fellow mobile engineers
* Brainstorm new ideas together with your team to continuously iterate and improve our games' user experience



  





**Desired skills and experiences** 




  




* University degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or any equivalent subject
* Having game projects in Unity is an advantage
* There’s no need to have prior game development experience. If you are an engineer and value a holistic and technology\-agnostic approach to software engineering, we’d like to hear from you!



  





**What you’ll learn in this role** 




  




* How to develop, release and maintain high quality code
* Strong engineering skills and programming fundamentals
* A good command of various programming languages (such as C\#, Java) and hands\-on experience of best practices and idioms of these languages
* Software architecture design, OOP, and design patterns and principles on various scales



  





**Working at Peak** 




  




* Fast\-paced environment with a tight\-knit and collaborative culture
* Never\-ending learning and development opportunities
* Relevant conferences abroad to stay up to date with the latest industry trends
* Team events and trips
* We support your personal and professional development with challenging projects and regular feedback
* Full health benefits

results.title: Software Engineer (New Grad)
results.description:
We are looking for a passionate new grad to join our team as a Software Engineer. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to all areas of game development, including programming graphics, game logic, and user interface using Unity. It is not required to have prior game development experience since we believe a competent software engineer can develop great things in any field. You will work effectively as part of a multi\-disciplinary team of engineers, artists, and game designers to create games that will be played by millions of people all around the world.
 



  





 At Dream Games, all team members have a genuine chance to contribute to the final product and have an impact on the company. If you want to be a team member of a fast\-growing company, you might be the person we are looking for!
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




  




* Designing, implementing, and testing game features
* Delivering well\-structured code and participating in code\-review sessions
* Creating flexible code that can be easily updated as the product evolves
* Contributing to the improvement of user experience in the games



  





**Requirements** 




  




* Fresh graduate from the field of Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or Software Engineering
* Knowledge of Object\-Oriented Programming
* Interest in Unity and C\#
* Passion and interest in games
* Appreciation and understanding of teamwork



  





**Compensation \& Benefits** 




  




* Monthly net salary is 300\.000 TL
* Health, dental, and vision insurance with %100 coverage
* Relocation support as needed

results.title: Yazılım Geliştirici (Java)
results.description:
**HAKKIMIZDA** 




 Faaliyetlerine 1995 yılında 21 mağazayla başlayan BİM Birleşik Mağazalar A.Ş. bugün Türkiye’nin organize perakende sektöründe pazar payı en yüksek şirketi konumundadır.
 



 BİM’in ana ilkesi, temel gıda ve tüketim malzemelerinin yüksek kalite ve en uygun fiyat ile tüketiciye ulaştırılmasıdır. Yüksek indirim (hard\-discount) modelinin Türkiye’deki ilk temsilcisi olan BİM, çoğunluğunu kendine ait markaların oluşturduğu yaklaşık 900 üründen oluşan ürün yelpazesini Türkiye çapında faaliyet gösteren perakende mağazaları aracılığıyla tüketicilere sunmaktadır. BİM ayrıca, 2021 yılı sonlarında BİM MARKET mobil uygulaması üzerinden gıda dışı ürün ile online alışveriş hizmeti de vermeye başlamıştır.
 



 BİM, istikrarlı bir biçimde büyümesini 2024 yılında da sürdürmüştür. 2024 yılında yurt içinde 886 yeni mağaza açarak 2024 yıl sonu itibarıyla Türkiye’de 12\.089 mağaza sayısına ulaşmıştır. Kalite anlayışından ve müşteri memnuniyeti önceliğinden vazgeçmeksizin etkin maliyet yönetimi politikasıyla gelişimine devam etmektedir.
 



  





**GENEL NİTELİKLER** 




  




* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili lisans programlarından mezun,
* E\-ticaret domaini geliştirme konusunda en an 3 yıllık tecrübeye sahip,
* Java 11\+ ve Spring Boot teknolojileri ile backend geliştirme konusunda deneyimli,
* REST ve SOAP tabanlı web servisleri geliştirme konusunda yetkin,
* Git ve diğer kaynak kod versiyonlama sistemleri konusunda tecrübeli,
* İlişkisel veritabanları tasarımı, optimizasyonu ve performans iyileştirmeleri konusunda deneyimli,
* ElasticSearch, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka gibi yüksek trafikli e\-ticaret sistemlerinde kullanılan teknolojilerle çalışma deneyimine sahip,
* CI/CD süreçlerinde aktif görev almış ve pipeline tasarımı ve yönetimi konusunda deneyimli,
* Güvenlik kavramları ve metodolojilerine aşina, (OAuth2, OIDC, Authorization Code Flow vb.)
* AWS veya GCP gibi bulut platformlarında çalışma deneyimi bulunan,
* Büyük Dil Modelleri (LLM), makine öğrenimi ve yapay zeka entegrasyonları konusunda temel bilgi ve farkındalığa sahip,
* Takım çalışmasına yatkın, insan ilişkileri ve iletişimi kuvvetli,
* Sonuç odaklı, sorumluluk alma ve analitik düşünme becerisine sahip,
* Problem çözme, planlama, takip ve raporlama yeteneği yüksek,
* İyi derecede İngilizce bilgisine sahip,
* Tercihen İstanbul Anadolu yakasında ikamet eden/edebilecek.



  





**GÖREV TANIMI** 




  




* Tasarım ve test süreçlerinde iş paydaşları (proje yöneticisi, analistler, geliştiriciler, test ve operasyon ekipleri) ile koordineli bir şekilde çalışmak,
* Sorumluluğundaki uygulamaları belirlenen standartlara ve güvenlik gereksinimlerine uygun olarak geliştirmek,
* Görev aldığı projelerde, tasarım ve test gibi süreçlerde şirket standartlarına uygun dokümantasyon sağlamak.
* Mevcut projelerde mimari tasarım, kod kalitesi ve performans iyileştirmelerine katkı sağlamak, test ve production ortamlarında ortaya çıkan hataları gidermek.
* Gerektiğinde code review süreçlerini yürütmek ve kod standartlarının uygulanmasını sağlamak

results.title: Backend Developer
results.description:
Location: Onsite, Istanbul/Maslak
 



  





 Description:
 



  





 We are seeking a Backend Developer to provide technical leadership and mentor a team of developers in designing and developing high\-performance, scalable backend systems. The ideal candidate should have hands\-on experience in building distributed systems, event\-driven architectures, and microservices while ensuring the highest code quality and system reliability.
 



  





 Responsibilities:
 



  





 Lead and mentor a backend development team, ensuring best practices and high coding standards.
 



 Design and implement scalable and high\-performance backend architectures.
 



 Actively participate in coding and software development to build scalable and high\-performance backend architectures.
 



 Develop event\-driven and distributed systems using message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.).
 



 Optimize and manage relational (SQL) and non\-relational (NoSQL) databases for high availability and performance.
 



 Utilize caching mechanisms (Redis, Memcached, etc.) to enhance system efficiency.
 



 Conduct code reviews and architectural discussions to maintain quality and scalability.
 



 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to align technical decisions with business needs.
 



 Stay updated with new technologies and incorporate them into the project when necessary.
 



 Work efficiently in an Agile/Scrum environment, participating in sprint planning, daily stand\-ups, and retrospectives.
 



  





 Qualifications:
 



  





 Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
 



 At least 5 years of experience in backend development.
 



 Strong expertise in Java and Spring Boot.
 



 Hands\-on experience with Aspect\-Oriented Programming (AOP), preferably in Java with Spring AOP.
 



 Hands\-on experience with microservices architecture.
 



 Proficiency in event\-driven development and messaging systems (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.).
 



 Strong understanding of software security principles and experience in implementing secure coding practices.
 



 Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases.
 



 Familiarity with caching mechanisms to optimize performance.
 



 Ability to thrive in a fast\-paced, high\-traffic system environment.
 



  





 Preferred Qualifications:
 



  





 Experience in high\-traffic systems such as sports betting, e\-commerce, or fintech.
 



 Knowledge of DevOps and CI/CD processes.
 



 Experience with cloud computing platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
 



 Familiarity with observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, NewRelic).
 



  





 What We Offer:
 



  





 Opportunities for technical and professional growth.
 



 A collaborative and dynamic work environment.
 



  





  





 Linkedin üzerinden elektronik olarak ileteceğiniz kişisel bilgileriniz, Şanstech bünyesinde oluşacak mevcut ve gelecek işe alım ihtiyaçları doğrultusunda istihdam olanaklarının değerlendirilmesi amacıyla 7 Nisan 2016 tarihli Resmi Gazete’de yayımlanan 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında veri sorumlusu olarak tarafımızca işlenecek ve veri tabanımızda gizlilik içerisinde saklanacaktır. Detaylı bilgiye internet sitemizde (https://www.sans\-technology.com/kvkk) Aydınlatma Metni içerisindeki “Çalışan Aday” alt başlığından ulaşabilirsiniz.
results.company_industry: Software Development and IT Services and IT Consulting

results.title: Software Engineer, Fullstack (New Grad)
results.description:
**About Codeway**
 Codeway is a global consumer tech company with more than 400M users worldwide.
   

  

 Since 2020, we’ve built and scaled 60\+ mobile apps across creativity, productivity, wellness, language learning, and entertainment.
   

  

 Our flagship apps — Retake AI, Cleanup, Learna, and DramaPops — and many of them lead their categories globally. In 2024, we became the most downloaded app publisher on iOS, driven by cutting\-edge AI research, sharp data\-driven execution, and a relentless focus on product and marketing.
   

  

 We’re a team of 300\+ people across İstanbul and Barcelona who bring curiosity, passion, trust, and ownership to everything we build. Recognized as a \#1 LinkedIn Top Startup and a Great Place to Work in Europe, Codeway is where ambitious people do their life’s best work.
   

  

 We’re building the next generation of consumer tech and reimagining what mobile apps can be.
   

  

 This is Codeway. This is our way. Join us.
   

  

 POSITION
   

  

 We are looking for a Software Engineer, Fullstack to join our team.
   

  

 As a Software Engineer, Fullstack, you will work on web projects across both back\-end and front\-end.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Analyze and deliver features. Analyze, implement, and deliver new features while monitoring and maintaining to offer high\-quality software solutions.
* Own your work end\-to\-end. Take full accountability for your work, from start to finish, by identifying any issues and improving our products.
* Stay curious and improve continuously. Maintain a sense of curiosity regarding emerging technologies and trends in the industry, continuously improving your technical skills and knowledge.
* Ensure code quality. Engage in code reviews to guarantee code quality, performance, and compliance with coding standards.
* Raise company\-wide standards. Recognize challenges that affect the entire company and strive to elevate the quality standards organization\-wide.


**What You’ll Bring**
* B.Sc. in Computer Science or a similar discipline.
* Experience with NodeJS.
* Experience with JavaScript, HTML, CSS, as well as frameworks like Vue or React.
* Experience with designing and implementing RESTful APIs.
* Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).
* Knowledge of unit/integration testing.
* Good communication and collaboration skills in English, with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.


 NICE TO HAVE
   

  

 Experience in relevant Google Cloud Products (e.g., Pub/Sub, Functions, App Engine)
   

  

 Experience with Vue3 and Firestore
   

  

 Experience with caching strategies (e.g., Redis, Memcached)
   

  

**What We Offer**
* Great Place to Work. As our top team member, you'll be a part of a fast\-growing startup and have the privilege to enjoy our accredited “BEST WORKPLACES” environment, ranked first among all workplaces.
* A Competitive Compensation Package. Long story short, we take care of you.
* A Meal Compensation. That is actually enough for a decent \& nutritious lunch, we’re not following the industry standard.
* Full Health Benefits. To keep you away from all the trouble, we provide unlimited private health insurance and cover the HPV vaccine.
* Pet Adoption Support. We cover the primary healthcare expenses, parasite vaccinations, and microchip costs that may arise within the first year after employees adopt a pet.
* Cool Tech Stack. Macbook, iPhone 15 Pro, magic mouse, magic keyboard; an adjustable desk with a 4K screen and any other gadget you may need in your job.
* Sport Activities Support. We care about your physical wellbeing and support your gym membership.
* Learning Never Ends! Training budget to help you grow in your role, gain new skills, and learn new things.
* Udemy Free Pass. An unlimited Udemy subscription.
* Flexible Schedule \& Unlimited Vacations. This isn’t a “clock in, clock out” company. We care about your productivity, not tracking every minute you’re on site. It’s up to you to always be responsible with your work, no matter where you are or what schedule you’re keeping.
* English Course Support. Be more global and perform best at your work.
* Comprehensive Well\-being Support. Through our partnership with Meditopia, we now offer free psychological counseling, along with additional services like dietitian, personal trainer, parenting consultant, physiotherapist, child \& adolescent therapist, and face\-to\-face counseling for employees in Istanbul.
* A Top\-Notch Office. Located at the heart of Istanbul, right next to Levent Metro Station at Ferko Signature.
* Codebrew. Yes, you’ve heard it right: We love coffee so much that we’ve built our own coffee shop inside our office, where we also provide healthy snacks at certain hours.
* Free Breakfast. At Codebrew \- every morning at 9:30 AM.
* No Dress Code. Dress as you like.
* Happy Hours Every Friday. Every. Single. Friday. When it’s 5 PM: Screens off, party on! (Check out Codeway on Instagram)
* Dream Team. Average Codeway member is young, talented, and passionate \- which makes our working environment extremely dynamic. Need proof? Take a look at our Instagram.
* Gaming Area. Whenever you need to take a break from hard work and relax with your favorite games, our PS5 corner will be waiting for you.
* Software Support. Subscription to any software you might need to perform at your best.
* Public Transportation Support. Daily public transportation support is on us, covered by an additional monthly compensation.
* Parent Support. Becoming a parent is a big moment, and Codeway celebrates it with you. We offer a one\-time grant to support our new parents.
* Massage Room. When you need a moment to recharge and unwind, our massage chair room will be ready to offer you a relaxing break.


 THE RECRUITING PROCESS
   

  

 We are committed to keeping our recruitment process short and transparent. Here’s how it looks like:
   

  

  

* Application: Send us your CV or LinkedIn profile. You can also just write a few words about yourself.
* Case Study: We might send you a task to solve.
* Talent \& Culture Interview: Let’s talk about your experience \& expectations and see what we can achieve together.
* Technical Interview: You will meet with future team lead to go over the case and your technical capabilities in detail.
* Reference Check: We will contact your references to gain insights into your past experiences and work ethic.
* Welcome Aboard! You are now a part of the team.


*Your personal data that will be collected through your applications made due to this advertisement will be processed automatically by the data controller Codeway in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK") and relevant legislation for the purpose of conducting job application processes. You can access detailed information on this matter from the
 **"Candidate Information Notice"** 
 page at* 
*https://www.codeway.co* 
*. Codeway processes the personal data of job applicants in accordance with relevant legislation. "
 **Privacy Notice for Employee Candidate***
 "
 *summarizes the data processing procedures during the application process.*
*Bu ilan sebebiyle yapacağınız başvurular aracılığıyla toplanacak kişisel verileriniz veri sorumlusu Codeway tarafından 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (“KVKK”) ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında iş başvuru süreçlerinin yürütülmesi amacıyla otomatik yollarla işlenecektir. Detaylı bilgiye* 
*https://www.codeway.co* 
*adresindeki* 
***"Aday Aydınlatma Metnimizin"***
*sayfasından ulaşabilirsiniz. Codeway, iş başvurusu yapan adayların kişisel verilerini, ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde işlemektedir.
 **"Çalışan Adayı İçin Gizlilik Bildirimi"** 
 başvuru sürecindeki veri işleme süreçlerini özetler.*
 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

results.title: JAVA DEVELOPER
results.description:
Turkcell olarak yeteneklerimize eşsiz insan deneyimi yaşatarak, değer yaratan sürdürülebilir bir organizasyon inşa etmeyi ve işveren markamızı zirveye taşımayı hedefliyoruz. Bu hedef doğrultusunda benimsediğimiz değerlerimizi iş yapış biçimlerimize yansıtıyoruz.
 



  





**Turkcell’de Neye Değer Veriyoruz?** 




**İnsan Odaklılık:** 
 Eşsiz insan deneyimi oluşturmak amacıyla uygulamalarımızın merkezinde insanı konumluyor, çalışanlarımızın potansiyelini en üst düzeye çıkarmayı ve onların yeteneklerini geliştirmeyi hedefliyoruz.
 



**Yenilik:** 
 İnsanların hayatında fark yaratan yenilikçi çözümler üretmek, fikir ve teknolojileri keşfetmek için tutkulu bir şekilde çalışıyoruz.
 **🚀** 




**Mükemmellik:** 
 Dahil olduğumuz ve temas ettiğimiz her noktada mükemmelliyeti hedefliyor, kendimize yüksek standartlar belirliyor, olağanüstü sonuçlar elde ediyoruz.
 **🎯👌🏼** 




**İş Birliği:** 
 Başarının anahtarı olarak birlikte çalışmayı, saygı ve şeffaflık kültürünü teşvik ediyoruz. 👥🔗🧩
 



**Müşteri Odaklılık:** 
 Müşterilerimizin ihtiyaçlarını merkeze koyarak olağanüstü müşteri deneyimleri sunmayı hedefliyoruz. 🤝🖇️
 



**Sürdürülebilirlik:** 
 Müşterilerimiz, çalışanlarımız ve dünyamız için sürdürülebilir bir gelecek amacıyla çalışıyoruz.
 **🌍** 




  





**Ne Bekliyoruz?** 



* Minimum 4 yıl yazılım geliştirme ve sistem analizi deneyiminin olmasını,
* İş gereksinimlerini teknik dokümana dönüştürebilmeni,
* Analitik düşünme ve problem çözme yeteneğinin güçlü olmasını,
* Süreç analizi, gereksinim yönetimi ve fonksiyonel tasarım konularında deneyimli olmanı,
* Çevik (Agile / Scrum) metodolojiler ile çalışmanı,
* Güçlü iletişim becerilerine sahip, iş birimleri ile teknik ekip arasında köprü olabilmeni,
* Finans, telekom veya büyük ölçekli kurumsal projelerde deneyimli olmanı,
* Domain\-driven design (DDD) bilgisine sahip olmanı,
* Teknik dokümantasyon araçları (Confluence, Jira vb.) kullanım deneyiminin olmasını,
* Java \& Backend teknolojilerine hakim olmanı,
* Java, Spring/Spring Boot ile RESTful servis geliştirme ve entegrasyon deneyimine sahip olmanı,
* Microservice mimarisi konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* Oracle, SQL, PL/SQL ve PostgreSQL veritabanları konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* Veri modelleme ve ER diyagram oluşturma konularına hakim olmanı,
* Performans odaklı sorgu yazımı konusunda deneyimli olmanı,
* REST ve SOAP servisleri ile entegrasyon ve servis mimarileri konusunda deneyime sahip olmanı,
* API Gateway kullanımı konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* JSON ve XML veri yapıları konusunda hakimiyet sahibi olmanı,
* Tercihen Kafka gibi mesajlaşma sistemleri konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* Git ile versiyon kontrolü konusunda deneyimli olmanı,
* Jenkins veya benzeri araçlarla CI/CD pipeline süreçleri konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* Docker ile container oluşturma ve yönetimi konusunda deneyimli olmanı,
* Kubernetes veya OpenShift konusunda bilgi sahibi olmanı,
* AWS, Azure veya Google Cloud Platform üzerinde deployment deneyimine sahip olmanı,
* Cloud\-native uygulama prensiplerine hakim olmanı.



  





**Turkcell’de Java Developer Ne Yapar?** 



* Rekabet koşullarında müşteri taleplerini hayata geçirmek için çevik çalışma yöntemleri (Scrum) ile iş üreten geliştirme takımında diğer ekip arkadaşları ile yakın çalışarak, uygulamaların analiz ve geliştirmelerini yapar,
* İş birimlerinden gelen talepleri analiz ederek fonksiyonel ve teknik gereksinim dokümanlarını hazırlar,
* Ürün ve çözümlerin yazılım mimarisini, teknik ve fonksiyonel yol haritasını belirler, tüm yazılım ve geliştirme yaşam döngüsünün sorumluluğunu alır,
* Mevcut sistemlerin analizini yapar, iyileştirme alanlarını belirler,
* Sorumluluk sahasındaki yazılımların istenen kalitede üretilmesini sağlar,
* Sorumlu olduğu alanlardaki geliştirmelere ilişkin birim testlerini yapar,
* Devreye alımda on\-site ve on\-call destek verir, olası soru ve sorunlar konusunda hızlı bir şekilde aksiyon alır,
* Devreye alım sonrası destek ve kod değişikliği gerektiren konularda ilgili yazılımları gerçekleştirir,
* AR\-GE vizyonu kapsamında yenilik fırsatlarını bütünsel bir bakış açısı ile gözetir.



  





**Aydınlatma Metni** 





 https://kariyerim.turkcell.com.tr/Documents/Calisan\_Adayi\_Aydinlatma\_Metni.pdf
 




  





**Yan Haklar ve Faydalar** 




 Ekibimizin bir üyesi olarak, rekabetçi bir ücret, esnek çalışma düzenlemeleri, kariyer gelişimi ve ilerleme fırsatları gibi bir dizi yan hak ve fayda ile buluşma fırsatı yakalayacaksın. Detaylara "
 
 https://bit.ly/TurkcellTKusagi
 
 ’’ üzerinden ulaşabilirsin. 🎁▶️
 



  





*\*Turkcell bir eşit fırsat işverenidir ve ırka, renge, dine, cinsiyete, ulusal kökene, etnik kökene, yaşa, fiziksel görünüşe veya duruma, medeni durumuna, askerlik durumuna bakılmaksızın, tüm nitelikli başvuru sahiplerini istihdam için değerlendirmeye alır.*

* Microservice mimarisi ve Container teknolojileri konusunda tecrübeli olmanı,
* Concurrency ve Multi\-threading konularında teknik uzmanlığa sahip olmanı,
* API\-first tasarım prensipleriyle RESTful servisler geliştirme ve asenkron sistemlerde (Kafka, Redis, RabbitMQ) çözüm üretme deneyimine sahip olmanı,
* PostgreSQL, Oracle veya MySQL gibi ilişkisel veri tabanlarında veri modelleme ve sorgu optimizasyonu hakimiyetinin olmasını (4\+ yıl tecrübe),
* Container teknolojileri, Git tabanlı versiyon kontrolü ve Jenkins ile otomatize edilmiş CI/CD süreçlerine aşina olmanı,
* DevSecOps kapsamında SonarQube ve Fortify gibi statik kod analiz araçlarını geliştirme disiplininin bir parçası olarak görme becerisine sahip olmanı,
* Unix/Linux ortamlarında temel seviye scripting ve işletim sistemi yetkinliğine sahip olmanı,
* Teknik analizi geliştirme süreci kadar kritik gören ve problemin köküne inmeyi seven mühendislik yaklaşımına sahip olmanı,
* İnisiyatif alabilen, çözüm odaklı ve karmaşık süreçleri sahiplenme motivasyonuna sahip olmanı,
* Telekomünikasyon domain bilgisini öğrenmeye hevesli, hem öğrenen hem de ekibine değer katan bir takım oyuncusu olmanı.



  





**Turkcell’de Java Developer Ne Yapar?** 



* Mobil faturalama dünyasının ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak amacıyla ölçeklenebilir, güvenilir ve yüksek performanslı uygulamaları yazar,
* Yeni uygulamaların geliştirilmesi ve mevcut uygulamaların güncel teknolojiler kullanılarak yeniler,
* İhtiyaç tanımlama ve kurgu oluşturma/olgunlaştırma adımlarının analist ile birlikte yapar, teknik fizibiliteyi gerçekleştirir,
* İş planındaki talepler için ihtiyaç ve çözüm mimarilerini tasarlar ve gerçekleştirir,
* Teknik tasarım dokümanlarını hazırlar,
* Business/IT kaynaklı ihtiyaçlara göre sorumluluğunda bulunan ürün/altyapıların mimari roadmap’ini belirler, bu roadmap’i gerçekleştirebilmek için gerekli projelerin hayata geçirilmesini sağlar,
* Unit, performans ve yük testlerinin oluşturur,
* Devreye alım süreçlerini iyileştirir.
