results.title: Senior Software Engineer (JAVA)
results.description:
**iyzico** 




 iyzico was founded in 2013 to provide online payment services and artificial intelligence\-based payment technologies to businesses of various sizes in the world of e\-commerce. By making the complex payment processes simple through its easy and secure platform, iyzico had achieved significant successes through supporting thousands of businesses in digitalization and was acquired by the global payment systems giant PayU in 2019\. With such a robust structure, iyzico is operating on the principle of democratizing financial services and making them accessible for everyone alongside the services it provides to businesses.
 



  





 Through iyzico Buyer Protection, consumers’ concerns regarding shopping online are resolved and better experiences are enabled. Control is handed back to the consumers by 24/7 live support through the iyzico mobile app and convenience in cancellation/returns processes. To this date, more than 2 million consumers shopped online under the security provided by iyzico Buyer Protection and this number is increasing daily. Via pay with iyzico, which is a blended payment solution, millions of consumers who do not use banking can safely shop online under the belt of iyzico Buyer Protection.
 



 iyzico continues to simplify online shopping for both consumers and sellers by the simple, accessible, and innovative technologies it developed.
 



  





 The engineering behind iyzico, the sweet home for iyzicoders, habitat for passionate engineers.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 Develop scalable, high\-volume and reliable user\-centric applications that operate 24x7
 



 Make technical design decisions independently
 



 Work with product managers and business stakeholders to analyze requirements, develop ideas, and design solutions.
 



 Guide team members by giving clear direction, feedbacks and timely suggestions to ensure a high\-quality standard of deliverables according to standards and best practices.
 



 Initiate tech meetings and other internal training to foster engineering team
 



 Willingness to take ownership of problems
 



 Research and propose new technologies
 



  





**Qualifications** 




 BSc degree in Computer Science or related degree.
 



 Experience in the following technologies (Java17, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, JPA, Redis, REST APIs, Bamboo, Git, ElasticSearch, Kotlin, Groovy).
 



 Experience with distributed systems and microservices architectures.
 



 Experience owning highly complex and risky modules.
 



 Experience in software engineering best practices for the full software development life cycle, including agile development, coding standards, code reviews, build processes, testing, and maintenance.
 



 Experience in payment industry is a plus.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 A culture of continuous development: conferences, in\-house events \& Tech Talks to stay up\-to\-date on current research and technology.
 *P.S.:You do not need to wait to get on the stage and share your expertise with you teammates and the community* 




 Online Training Platform (Free access to Udemy, Harvard ManageMentor, Get abstract, etc.),
 



 Free Safari Books account. iyzinators are encouraged to read and train more,
 



 Freedom under responsibility is our common mindset. That’s how we designed our flexible working model called iyzico Homequarters. Our homequarters is in Altunizade.
 



 Meal \& Internet Allowance.
 



 Transportation Allowance.
 



 A gift voucher to meet tech needs and ergonomic workspace at home.
 



 Macbook (and monitor if needed)
 



 Employee support program: free psychological counseling, legal advice, financial advice etc.
 



 Private health insurance,
 



 1 day birth day leave.
 



 An iyzicoMate is assigned to help you with anything you may need on your onboarding.
 



 A detailed orientation program designed for you to fully grasp the iyzico culture.

results.title: Senior Software Engineer 'Digital Channels Customer Acquisition Application Development'
results.description:
**About:**




 Yapı Kredi Technology is a technology company that produces innovative, high quality, and high value\-added products and solutions in the finance sector. With more than 2,000 employees, it aims to create products that will shape the sector for Yapı Kredi Bank and to be the undisputed leader in the field of technology by using modern architectural systems and cloud technologies. It also contributes to the development of new and exemplary products for the sector by using natural language processing, machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data mining technologies with its R\&D team.
 



  





**Who We Are:**




 At Yapı Kredi Technology, we research with passion, wonder as we learn, and implement innovations that shape the future together. We take responsibility from the first day with our expert colleagues and work with all our strength for pioneering applications. We make quick decisions and take action. We quickly adapt to innovations and changes.
 



  





**What Do We Offer:**




 📌 Opportunity to work in hybrid model
 



 💻Opportunity to work in Koç Group Community Companies' offices
 



 🌴Chance to discover the natural wonders and amenities offered at Koç Toplululuğu Spor Kulübü (KTSK)
 



 🚀Career development opportunities in a structured technology career path
 



 💫 Opportunity to benefit from BizClub and KoçAilem privileges exclusive to Yapı Kredi Technology employees
 



 🤝Company\-contributed individual retirement insurance
 



 🎂 Birthday off day
 



  





**Qualifications:**



* BS or MS in Computer Engineering or Software Engineering,
* Minimum 5\+ years of professional software development experience,
* Solid knowledge of Java, Spring Boot, Maven, Hibernate/JPA,
* Strong understanding of object\-oriented programming (OOP) and design patterns,
* Experience in RESTful API design and service\-oriented architecture (SOA),
* Experience with microservices and distributed systems architectures,
* Experience in developing backend services for mobile applications,
* Hands\-on experience with relational database systems (preferably Oracle),
* Preferably experience or strong interest in WebRTC and real\-time communication technologies.
* Familiarity with cloud\-based application architectures,
* Preferably knowledgeable about JavaScript frameworks (React.js, etc.),
* Experience with messaging systems such as Kafka or RabbitMQ and caching technologies like Redis,
* Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and test\-oriented development practices (TDD, unit and integration testing),
* Experience with container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus,
* Strong analytical thinking and problem\-solving skills,
* Team\-oriented mindset with strong communication skills,
* Eager to learn, adapt, and take ownership of responsibilities,
* Creative, proactive, and result\-oriented approach to work.



  





**Job Description:**



* Develop and maintain for area\-specific digital banking products such as Customer Acquisition Processes, KYC, Digital Onboarding, Video Banking and Video Chat Solutions,
* Work in close collaboration with Yapı Kredi Information Technologies teams in alignment with corporate IT standards, methodologies, and processes,
* Design, develop, and maintain highly available, scalable, and secure backend services supporting both web and mobile applications,
* Design and implement RESTful APIs used by mobile SDKs, frontend applications, and third\-party systems,
* Contribute to architectural decisions with a focus on performance, security, scalability, and maintainability in mobile and distributed environments,
* Participate in code reviews, ensuring clean code, best practices, and high\-quality standards,
* Actively follow technological developments and adopt new software development tools, frameworks, and methodologies into projects,
* Support CI/CD pipelines and contribute to automated testing and deployment processes,
* Collaborate closely with mobile, frontend, and platform teams to deliver end\-to\-end solutions,
* Analyze production issues, perform root cause analysis, and contribute to continuous system improvements,



  





**Candidate Selection Process:**




 Our recruitment process for all positions typically encompasses technical interviews, director assessments, competency evaluations, and personality tests. We will extend our offer to candidates who have successfully completed a positive evaluation process.

results.title: Yazılım Geliştirme Çözüm Lideri
results.description:
**Gelecek’te Bizimle Misin?** 




  









**Biz Kimiz?** 




 Biz, toplumları ve bireyleri finansal özgürlükleriyle buluşturmayı amaçlayan, odağında önce insanın olduğu kültürümüzle, çalışanlarımızın yaşamına katma değer katmayı önceliklendiren bir takımız.
 



 Biz, ülkemizin önde gelen itibarlı gruplarından Fiba Grubu’nun bir parçası olarak 2005 yılından beri sektörünün lideri bir finans şirketiyiz.
 







  





**Pozisyon Adı** 




 Yazılım Geliştirme Çözüm Lideri
 







  





**''Gelecek” Takım Arkadaşımız Nasıl Olmalı** 



* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Elektrik\-Elektronik Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun,
* Yazılım geliştirme alanında en az 5 yıl, liderlik veya proje sorumluluğu deneyimi bulunan,
* Analiz, tasarım ve yazılım geliştirme yaşam döngüsü konusunda tecrübeli,
* .NET, Java, C\#, Python vb. yazılım dillerinden en az birinde ileri seviye bilgi sahibi,
* RESTful API, entegrasyon, veritabanı yönetimi (MSSQL, Oracle vb.) konularında deneyimli,
* Agile/Scrum gibi çevik proje yönetim metodolojilerine hâkim,
* Ekip yönetimi, görev dağılımı ve süreç takibi konularında güçlü,
* İş birimleriyle etkili iletişim kurabilen, ihtiyaçları doğru analiz edebilen,
* Problem çözme ve karar alma becerileri gelişmiş, çözüm odaklı,
* Tercihen finans, bankacılık veya sigortacılık sektörlerinde tecrübeli,
* Bilgi güvenliği ve yazılım geliştirme standartlarına hâkim,
* Erkek adaylar için askerlik hizmetini tamamlamış.



  





**“Gelecek”in Sorumlulukları** 



* Şirketin yazılım geliştirme süreçlerinde, uçtan uca çözüm sunarak iş ihtiyaçlarını analiz etmek, teknik gereksinimleri belirlemek ve uygun yazılım çözümlerinin tasarlanmasını sağlamak,
* Yazılım geliştirme ekibine teknik liderlik yapmak, görev dağılımını yönetmek ve proje planlamasını gerçekleştirmek,
* İş birimleriyle yakın çalışarak gereksinimleri toplamak, iş analizlerini koordine etmek ve yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine dönüştürmek,
* Proje kapsamındaki tüm yazılım çözümlerinin mimari yapısının oluşturulmasına destek vermek,
* Kod kalitesini, geliştirme standartlarını ve yazılım süreçlerinin sürekliliğini sağlamak,
* Geliştirilen projelerin test, canlıya alma ve sonrası destek süreçlerini koordine etmek,
* Entegrasyon, veri modelleme ve sistem mimarisi gibi konularda teknik yönlendirme yapmak,
* Proje süreçlerinde karşılaşılan sorunlara çözüm üretmek, riskleri yönetmek ve önleyici aksiyonlar almak.



  





**Neden Bizimle Çalışmalısınız?** 




 🥇2005 yılından bu yana sektörünün lideri bir finans şirketiyiz.
 



 🤝Kadın çalışan ve yönetici oranımızla eşitlikçi bir ortam sunuyoruz.
 



 💻Hibrit çalışma (%50 ofis\- %50 uzaktan) ile yeni nesil çalışma olanağı sağlıyoruz.
 



 💫İnsana değer veren kültürümüzle çalışanlarımızın gelişimini, kariyerini, esenliğini önemsiyoruz.
 



 👪Çalışanlarımızla birlikte ailelerinin de esenliğini düşünüyoruz. Eş ve çocukları kapsayan özel sağlık sigortası, hayat sigortası sunuyoruz.
 



 ❤Gönüllülük çalışmaları ile topluma farklı açılardan katkıda bulunuyoruz.
 



 🚌Geniş servis ağımız ile ofislerimize ulaşımı kolaylaştırıyoruz.
 



 👜Şirket katkılı bireysel emeklilikle geleceğinize birlikte yatırım yapıyoruz.
 



 🧩Esnek Yan Haklar Programımız Fi’bana Göre ile haklarımızı kişiselleştirebiliyoruz.
 



 📝Öğren\-G Akademi ile profesyonel ve kişisel gelişiminize katkı sağlıyoruz.
 



 😎Hobi kulüpleri ve etkinlikler ile birlikte eğleniyoruz.
 



 🛍Grup indirimleri sunuyoruz.
 



  









**İşe Alım Süreçlerimizde Prensiplerimiz** 



* Din, dil, ırk, yaş, etnik köken, cinsiyet, politik veya cinsel yönelim gibi hiçbir koşulda ayrımcılık gözetmeden, fırsat eşitliğini, kapsayıcılığı ve liyakati temel alıyoruz.
* İlan başvurularını sadece işe alım süreci için kullanıyoruz.
* Başvuru sahiplerinin kişisel bilgileri, sadece işle ilgili değerlendirme ve iletişim amacıyla kullanıyoruz.
* Başvuru sahiplerinin gizliliğine saygı gösteriyor ve kişisel bilgileri üçüncü şahıslarla paylaşmıyoruz.

results.title: OBSS AI-Native Engineering Internship Program
results.description:
**Company Description** 




 OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy company, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI\-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, defence, insurance, e\-commerce, retail, and the start\-up ecosystem.
 



 Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning \- building scalable, resilient, and future\-ready systems.
 



  





**AI\-Native Engineering Internship Program \- Summer Internship Program** 




 Remote \| 4 Weeks \| Full\-Time
 



 July 20, 2026 – August 14, 2026
 



 We know that transitioning from campus to a professional engineering environment can feel overwhelming. That’s why OBSS AI\-Native Engineering Internship Program is designed around next\-generation engineering models where AI plays a central role \- not as a shortcut, but as a consciously orchestrated system component.
 



 This is not a conventional internship focused only on coding tasks. Throughout the program, participants will work within a structured product simulation environment based on spec\-driven development, feature\-based end\-to\-end ownership, mandatory AI orchestration, and structured mentorship checkpoints.
 



 Our mentorship framework ensures continuous feedback, supporting both technical depth and professional growth.
 



  





**Program Requirements** 



* Currently enrolled as a 3rd or 4th year Bachelor’s student in Computer Engineering or related STEM fields
* Solid software development fundamentals
* Prior hands\-on experience with at least one AI coding assistant or AI development tool (e.g., Github Copilot, Cursor, Antigravity, Codex CLI, Claude Code CLI or similar tools)
* Foundational awareness of LLMs, AI agents, prompt design basics, and spec\-first or structured development thinking
* Strong interest in AI\-native development approaches and high motivation to deepen expertise
* Willingness to use AI tools not as automatic answer generators, but as consciously guided and controlled system components
* Analytical mindset, ownership attitude, and collaborative team spirit



 We prioritize candidates who are already actively exploring AI tooling and engineering workflows on their own.
 



  





**Recruitment Process** 




 All applications will be carefully reviewed.
 



 Shortlisted candidates will be invited to an HR interview, followed by a technical interview as part of the selection process.
 



 The evaluation process assesses not only technical skills but also AI tool usage awareness, problem\-solving approach with AI, model selection reasoning, understanding of context management and limitations, and structured engineering thinking.
 



  





**What Will You Learn?** 



* Build an AI\-native engineering mindset
* Practice spec\-driven product development
* Experience feature\-based end\-to\-end ownership
* Learn how to position AI as a system component rather than a coding shortcut
* Gain hands\-on experience in AI orchestration, model reasoning, and context management
* Develop future\-ready, scalable engineering capabilities
* Practice collaborative decision\-making across product, technical, and AI perspectives.



  





**Company Culture and Values** 




 We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued.
 



  





 Are you ready to make a difference in your career with OBSS? Let's apply!

results.title: AI Engineer Tech Lead
results.description:
**Location:** 
 Fully remote (EMEA timezone)
   

  

**Start date:** 
 ASAP
   

  

**Language:** 
 Fluent English required
   

  

**Industry:** 
 AI / Fintech / B2B SaaS Marketplace / Graph AI
   

  

**About The Company**
 Pragmatike is recruiting on behalf of an e
 **arly\-stage startup building an AI\-powered relationship intelligence and fundraising platform that connects funds, investors, and networks** 
 through a private relationship graph.
   

  

 The platform leverages graph architecture, data pipelines, and AI\-driven recommendations to transform professional networks (LinkedIn, email, CRM, teams, advisors, and portfolio) into intelligent warm introduction paths. By combining relationship intelligence with AI and scalable infrastructure, the company aims to make fundraising faster, more efficient, and significantly more predictable.
   

  

 The product is already built and validated, and the current focus is on scaling the graph, strengthening the AI layer, improving recommendation quality, and building strong network effects and technical defensibility. The team is product\-driven, fast\-moving, and focused on building a scalable AI\-native platform from the ground up.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a hands\-on
 **AI Engineer Lead** 
 to drive the technical development of the Graph AI platform.
   

  

 This is not a managerial\-only position — it is a deeply technical builder role. You will be directly responsible for improving and scaling the relationship graph, developing AI\-driven matching and recommendation systems, and shipping core product and infrastructure features.
   

  

 You will work closely with the founders and play a critical role in shaping the technology roadmap, product direction, and system scalability while building a strong AI and graph\-based foundation for the platform.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Own the end\-to\-end architecture and technical development of the Graph AI platform
* Improve and scale the private relationship graph (matching, pathfinding, performance, and privacy)
* Design and implement AI\-powered relationship scoring and recommendation systems
* Develop Graph RAG and intelligent introduction recommendations
* Build and ship core backend and infrastructure features
* Maintain and improve data pipelines (email, LinkedIn, CRM integrations, identity resolution)
* Optimize onboarding and ensure fast product aha moment
* Lead cloud infrastructure and DevOps (AWS, Docker, deployments, scaling, reliability)
* Ensure performance, scalability, and security of the system
* Make key decisions on system design, architecture, and AI implementation
* Collaborate closely with founders on product roadmap and technical strategy
* Contribute to building a strong and defensible network\-effect\-driven platform


**Required Experience \& Profile**
* 3–8\+ years of experience in software engineering, AI, or ML
* Proven experience as:
+ AI Engineer Lead, Tech Lead, Founding Engineer, or
+ Senior backend / AI engineer in an early\-stage startup

* Strong backend and system design experience
* Hands\-on experience building and shipping production systems
* Experience with AI/ML\-powered features and LLM\-based systems
* Experience working with Python and modern backend frameworks (e.g., FastAPI)
* Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS) and scalable architectures
* Understanding of data pipelines and distributed systems
* Interest or experience in graph systems, recommendation systems, or AI agents
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced startup environment
* Strong ownership, autonomy, and product mindset


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Experience with graph systems or network\-based platforms
* Experience with Graph RAG or knowledge graphs
* Background in fintech, fundraising, or marketplace platforms
* Experience with recommendation systems or ranking algorithms
* Experience with CRM, email, or LinkedIn data integrations
* Previous experience in early\-stage or founding teams
* Experience scaling products from early\-stage to growth


 What We Offer
   

  

* Founding\-level role with high impact on company direction
* Full ownership of the AI and Graph platform development
* Opportunity to build a large\-scale AI\-driven network platform
* Highly autonomous and fast\-moving environment
* Fully remote setup with flexible work style


*Pragmatike is an Equal Opportunity Employer and is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all applicants without discrimination. We recruit on behalf of our clients and prohibit discrimination and harassment based on race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by applicable laws. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, compensation, and training. We are committed to a fair and inclusive hiring process and process personal data solely for recruitment purposes in accordance with applicable privacy laws.*

results.title: Senior Software Engineer
results.description:
**Pluxee (Formerly Sodexo Benefits \& Rewards)** 




  





 The leading global employee benefits and engagement partner that opens up a world of opportunities to help everyone enjoy more of what really matters to them. We believe that living life to the full means making the most of every moment and sharing experiences with the people we care about.
 



  





 Through a full range of innovative and digital solutions deployed in 29 countries, Pluxee creates meaningful, engaging, and personalized experiences to contribute to the well\-being of individuals at work and beyond. From meal and food, culture, gifts to wellness and mobility, Pluxee’s products and services are designed to bring more value to people. Pluxee supports the purchasing power and promotes the well\-being of more than 37 million consumers.
 



 Pluxee accompanies 500,000 clients to develop more meaningful relationships with their employees and improve their engagement. Pluxee simplifies the life of 1\.7 million merchants every day. Strengthened by its historical ties with Sodexo, Pluxee with its 5,400 employees is committed to increase its influence as CSR leader by giving its clients, partners and consumers the means to make more sustainable choices every day.
 



  





 We are Pluxee, ex\- Sodexo Benefits and Rewards Services, we’re inventing entirely new ways to influence and enrich the lives of employees worldwide.
 



  





**We bring to life benefit platforms and payment solutions to open up a world of opportunities to our 500,000 clients and 37 million of their employees in 29 countries.**

 using

**🌟 You’re a match, if you have:** 




  




* **BS or MS degree** 
 in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.

 in software development with

 .
* Hands\-on experience with

 and

 like

 principles and familiarity with

 processes and version control systems.
* Excellent
 **problem\-solving** 
 ,

 , and

 ☀️ Happy at work
 




  




* **A meaningful job:** 
 build the future of employee benefits and contribute to the quality of life at work for others, you will impact positively local communities too. It counts!
* **A great culture:** 
 we respect and care authentically about our people, we embrace work life balance, new ideas and we have a lot of fun!

 So, you can expect a comprehensive package including competitive salary \+ annual bonus based on performance \+ PluxeeFlex (flex benefits) \+ career development opportunities.\+ extra welcome leave (6 days) in your first year.

 we care about your growth — with our

**📍 Location:** 
 Küçükyalı, Maltepe, Istanbul

 👉

 Our company will process the personal data you may submit within the scope of your application as a controller to evaluate your application for the position you have applied or further recruitment opportunities in association with your application. results.title: Software Developer
results.company: Asis Elektronik ve Bilişim Sistemleri A.Ş.
results.description:
Asis Electronics is a fast\-growing organization and market leader in smart technology solutions with over 450 employees. Our solutions help transport authorities to provide effective transit systems via easing passenger movement and improving operations management. Besides Turkey, our portfolio covers countries in Europe, Middle East, Africa and South Asia with on\-ground operations. As an R\&D and innovation focused company, we are shaping up next generation technology for smart transportation and smart cities. In addition, we are developing applications for automotive, defense, and financial technologies. As Asis Electronics, we are among the companies that shape the IT sector with our value\-adding solutions. With our successful performance in different categories, we took our place in the 22nd “Top 500 IT Companies Survey” conducted by BT News. We are looking for a
 **''Software Developer (.NET)”** 
 creative, game changer, innovative thinker, who takes initiative and is driven to help improve systems and embraces a culture of teamwork. As a member of our team, you will be part of new game changing solutions that would have a real impact on the next generation smart city .
 



  





**Qualifications \& Requirements**



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or related field
* Extensive experience with modern web application and enterprise application development platforms (ex:.NET,J2EE,Javascript)
* **Having at least 5 years or more experience.**
* Very good command of English , both written and spoken
* **Developing tools and software applications using .NETCore , Web API and WCF Web services,**
* **Experience with Domain Driven Design, ElasticSearch, Redis, MongoDB**
* **Rest, WebSocket, Mqtt, gRPC mastered, GraphQL is a plus**
* **Experienced in SQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Oracle is a plus.**
* **Experienced in Microservices and CQRS is a plus.**
* Experienced in UnitTest is a plus.
* Experience with running projects using of agile \-scrum methodology
* Awareness of priority and driven to meet deadlines
* Organized and self\-driven and able to adapt in a fast\-paced environment.



  





**Job Description**



* Design and developt robust solutions based on customer workflow needs with attention to best practices in\-terms of high availability, security, efficiency, operability and scalability while balancing budget
* Will be responsible for software design, development and implementation
* React and iterate to changing technical scope and requirements
* Expanding on dozens of state\-of\-the\-art architecture design patterns by making the next\-level technical design decisions that further define the product architecture.
* Navigate, escalate and lead efforts on complex customer requests or projects involving multiple parties and enterprise systems.
* Sets up and documents the solution architecture in accordance with technical specifications.
* Create and developt technical architectural structure related to products.
* Provide leadership and mentoring for developers on your project teams.



  





  





**What’s in it for you;**



* You will impact and the opportunity to do amazing projects.Using some of the latest technologies
* Obtain and enhance smart city and fintech experience
* You will actively gain experience in agile working environment
* Opportunity to work with a dynamic team



  





  





**Next Step**



* If this sounds like a good fit, if you’re excited to do something challenging and meaningful that preserves your ability to the fullest, waiting your application



  





  





 \*\*Your personal data gathered in your application to this job advertisement will be processed in automated systems to manage job application procedures by Asis Elektronik ve Bilişim Sistemleri A.Ş. according to the Law No. 6698 on the Protection on the Protection of Personal Data (“KVKK”) and related regulations.

results.title: Altyapı Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı (.Net Core)
results.description:
**BİZ KİMİZ?** 




 Maroteknoloji, öncelikle finans sektöründe kapsamlı bilgi teknolojisi hizmetleri sunan bağımsız bir bilişim şirketidir. Temel uzmanlık alanımız, katma değerli projeler ve en yüksek hizmet kalitesi aracılığıyla hem yurt içinde hem de uluslararası düzeyde geniş bir müşteri yelpazesine hizmet veren ve bunlarla ortaklık yapan bankacılık teknolojilerini içerir.
 



 Aralık 2010 da Lale Maro tarafından kurulan Maroteknoloji, Bankacılık Teknolojisi, BT stratejisi oluşturma ve uygulama, BT yönetişimi, kurumsal mimari, iş analizi ve yazılım geliştirme konularında uzmanlaşmıştır. Şirket yaklaşık 150 çalışanı ile İstanbul merkezlidir.
 



  





**NEDEN MAROTEKNOLOJİ?** 




 Finans yazılımı ve proje yönetimi konusunda 20 yılı aşkın deneyime sahip deneyimli bir ekip,
 



 Sektör, bankacılık teknolojileri ve yerel ihtiyaçlar hakkında derin bilgi birikimi (BDDK, SPK, vb.)
 



 Gizlilik ilkelerine maksimum bağlılık, kaliteye özen ve güçlü etik değerler
 



 En üst düzeyde müşteri memnuniyeti: İstisnasız müşterilerimiz referanslarımızdır.
 



 Sonuç odaklı ve motivasyonu yüksek ekip; müşterilerin ihtiyaçlarına hızla uyum sağlayabilen dinamik organizasyon. Projeler zamanında ve bütçe dahilinde tamamlanır.

results.title: DevSecOps Engineer
results.description:
**Lead the Journey at ForInvest!** 
**🚀** 




 Embark on an adventure where finance meets innovation, and imagination knows no bounds. For over three decades, we've been at the forefront of the industry, transforming investing into a seamless, insightful, and dare we say, delightful experience accessible to all.
 



 And our most exhilarating journey lies ahead: Shaping and leading the future of Investment Technologies.
 



  





**Your Role as the DevSecOps Engineer:** 



* Design and evolve
 **scalable, fault\-tolerant distributed components** 
 based on core DevSecOps principles across ForInvest’s fintech ecosystem
* Partner with
 **internal and external stakeholders** 
 to understand business needs and design solutions aligned with
 **enterprise architecture** 
 standards
* Drive
 **engineering best practices** 
 to improve delivery quality and reliability with a
 **shift\-left security** 
 mindset
* Design and build
 **automated deployment systems** 
 , including
 **CI/CD pipelines and workflows** 
 , using best\-in\-class tools
* Lead
 **developer productivity initiatives** 
 across automation, CI/CD, observability, and release engineering
* Promote
 **GenAI adoption** 
 to improve developer productivity; define metrics and build automation rails to measure impact
* Continuously improve
 **DevSecOps tooling and processes** 
 ; track maturity through relevant metrics
* Champion
 **application, infrastructure, and enterprise security** 
 initiatives
* Perform
 **component\-level security analysis** 
 (code/data flow reviews) and work with Security teams on
 **secure coding, certificate management, and secure configurations**
* Support
 **banking audits and regulatory compliance** 
 by answering technical inquiries and implementing required controls/actions
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with
 **Engineering, Operations, Infrastructure, Security, and other stakeholders**
* Ensure
 **stability, high availability, and reliability** 
 across production and lower environments
* Design and implement
 **APIs, abstractions, and integration patterns** 
 to solve CI/testing/deployment challenges
* Execute
 **code deployments** 
 and proactive maintenance to keep services healthy and available
* Contribute to
 **enterprise architecture initiatives** 
 and the long\-term evolution of ForInvest’s fintech platform architecture



  





**Desired Skills and Experience:** 



* 3\+ years of experience in DevOps/DevSecOps within enterprise\-grade systems
* Strong hands\-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud\-native environments
* Deep understanding of CI/CD practices and modern DevOps design patterns
* Experience building pipelines with GitLab, Maven, Docker or similar toolchains
* Strong knowledge of SDLC, version control, automated testing, and release processes
* Experience managing production systems in public or private cloud environments
* Understanding of microservices, distributed systems, clustering models, and networking
* Proficiency in scripting (Bash, Python or similar)
* Experience with observability tools such as Prometheus, Grafana, Elasticsearch, Graylog or similar
* Familiarity with infra \& security tools like Checkmarx (SAST/SCA), Trend Vision One, FortiGate, VMware, Ansible etc.
* Experience responding to regulatory or banking audit requirements
* Strong communication skills — able to translate technical risk into business impact
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or related field



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Experience in fintech, digital payments, or financial services
* Experience with distributed databases or high\-frequency transaction systems
* Exposure to enterprise architecture and integration patterns
* AWS Certified Security – Specialty certification



  





 📍
 **This is a hybrid position based in Istanbul and expected to work from the office 2–3 set days per week.** 




  





**Our Culture:** 




 We take pride in our values and principles, which capture the essence of our culture:
 



**Thrive Together** 




 Embracing challenges as one, we empower each other's wellbeing, growth, and success.·
 



**Aspire, Inspire and Grow** 




 We aspire to be and do our best, every day. We inspire others to do the same.
 



**Dream, Act, Innovate** 




 We anchor imagination with focused action. We nurture our dreams, execute, and iterate for excellence.
 



**Fueled by Passion, Driven by Joy** 




 We do what we love and love what we do.
 



**Own It** 




 We stand by our choices, actions and commitments, demonstrating unwavering accountability.
 



**United in Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion** 




 We respect and honour everyone. Period.
 



  





**Why ForInvest?** 



* Real impact — your decisions shape products used by institutions and thousands of investors
* Secure\-by\-design influence — help shape how we build and ship software securely across the SDLC
* High\-ownership culture — no red tape, just smart people shipping great products
* Competitive package — salary, benefits, and long\-term growth that matches your impact



 Ready to build the future of investment technology?
 



 Apply now and let's talk.
 



  





**Your Path to Leading the Journey with Us:** 




 Engage in our streamlined hiring process that ensures our visions resonate. From the initial conversations to the final discussions, we seek alignment, enthusiasm, and a shared journey.
 



 Hiring Process: \- The interview process for this role will begin in three weeks \-
 



 Please review our clarification text on our website for details: https://www.forinvest.com/kvkk.pdf

results.title: Senior Software Specialist
results.description:
We are looking for a
 **Senior Software Specialist** 
 to join the dynamic and experienced team of Hepiyi Sigorta.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 We are building high\-traffic digital insurance platforms used by thousands of agents and customers.
 



 This is not a ticket\-driven coding role.
 



 We are looking for engineers who think in architecture, performance, and product impact.
 



 You will work primarily on backend services, REST APIs, asynchronous processing, and system performance improvements.
 



**What You Will Do** 



* Design and develop scalable RESTful APIs using .NET Core,
* Contribute to event\-driven architecture and asynchronous workflows,
* Improve system performance, reliability, and maintainability,
* Take ownership of features from technical design to production deployment,
* Analyze and resolve technical and performance bottlenecks,
* Collaborate with frontend and product teams,
* Participate in code reviews and technical discussions to elevate engineering standards.



**Required Experience \& Skills** 



* 4\+ years of backend development experience with .NET Core / C\#,
* Strong understanding of OOP, SOLID principles, and clean architecture,
* Experience designing and consuming RESTful APIs,
* Hands\-on experience with asynchronous and event\-driven systems,
* Experience with message brokers (e.g., RabbitMQ),
* Experience implementing background job processing (e.g., Hangfire or similar),
* Understanding of caching strategies and distributed system concepts,
* Experience working with production systems,
* Clear written and verbal communication skills.



**Nice to Have** 



* Experience with high\-traffic or performance\-critical systems,
* Experience with Redis or distributed caching,
* Basic knowledge of React (for minor UI tasks),
* Experience in insurance, fintech, or regulated domains,



**What Makes You Successful Here** 



* You think beyond tickets and focus on system quality,
* You take ownership and responsibility for outcomes,
* You care about long\-term maintainability,
* You are curious about improving both the product and the engineering process.

results.title: Test Engineer
results.description:
**Who are we?** 




  





 Rubikpara is an Electronic Money Institution established in 2020, operating under the Electronic Money and Payment Services Law No. 6493, regulated by the Central Bank of Turkey. Combining Virtual POS, Mobile POS, Physical POS, and B2B products, Rubikpara facilitates financial experiences with fast, secure, and user\-friendly interfaces.
 



 With its technology\-driven approach and dedication to customer satisfaction, Rubikpara continues to grow as a leading financial solution provider. We invite you to discover our strong and innovative financial solutions.
 



  





 We are currently seeking
 **"Test Engineer”** 
 for our growing team.
 








**What we expect from you?** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree from relevant programs of universities,
* Minimum 5 years of experience in Quality Assurance roles with testing experience,
* Experience in financial technologies instutitions,
* Knowledge of fintech products (VirtualPOS, SoftPOS, Wallet, Card etc.)
* Experience in manual and automation testing,
* Experience in writing clear, concise, and comprehensive test plans and test cases,
* Knowledge of testing integrations, and end\-to\-end system processes.
* Ability to think outside of the box,
* Experience working in an Agile/Scrum development process,
* Needs to possess excellent communication and people skills,
* Ability to multi\-task, meet deadlines and stay calm under pressure,
* Interest in studying and learning new things.



  





**What will you do when you join us?** 




  




* Design test processes and procedures used to ensure that software operates within defined requirements.
* Create detailed, comprehensive, and well\-structured test plans and test cases.
* Implement test plans, automation, and validation strategies.
* Develop and maintain automated test scripts to reduce repetitive manual testing.
* In\-depth functional testing – Must be able to evaluate functional stability to ensure business requirements are being met and are “fit\-for\-purpose” through end\-to\-end functional and automation testing.
* Document and monitor testing outcomes and establish steps to remedy problems.
* Work closely with software developers and business analysts to resolve issues.
* Collaborate with Business Analysts and Developers on tasks related to the planning, testing, and coordination of release activities.
* Participate in user story creation process through dissection of high\-level requirements during team review sessions.
* Communicate any obstacles to raise awareness and avoid project impediments and overall project timeline disruption.
* Lead, guide, and support team members, and help streamline work processes to improve efficiency and consistency.



  





**Next\-Generation Working Models** 




 We offer flexible working models to help our employees maintain a healthy work–life balance. We provide the opportunity to adjust working hours based on individual needs and offer mobile working options. In addition, we support fathers during this special period through our mobile paternity leave practice.
 



  





**Career Development** 




 We provide continuous learning and development opportunities to help our employees reach their full potential. Through our LearnUP learning platform, we encourage continuous learning, and with our PerformUP program, we support and track performance development.
 



  





**Flexible Lifestyle Benefits** 




 We offer a flexible meal allowance package that allows employees to choose according to their needs. This package can be used across various categories such as food, fuel, wellness, travel, fashion, and electronics, aiming to enhance our employees’ quality of life.
 



  





**Exclusive Benefits** 




 Through our WellUP program, we offer a comprehensive wellbeing package ranging from dietitian and psychological counseling services to physiotherapy support and healthy lifestyle applications. While our health insurance supports our employees’ healthcare security, our cashback program provides additional financial benefits. We celebrate special moments with birth and marriage gifts and support working mothers through childcare assistance.
 



  





**Special Moments** 




 We stand by our employees on their special days. We extend maternity, paternity, and marriage leaves with additional days, and enable employees to spend more time with their loved ones through leave on a child’s first day of school, report card day, and wedding anniversary. We also provide flexibility for personal milestones through birthday and relocation leave.
 



  





**Reward and Recognition** 




 We foster a culture that rewards success. We support employees who demonstrate outstanding performance and commitment through various bonuses and rewards. In line with company performance, we share success together through shadow equity options.
 



  





 As the Rubikpara family, we grow and evolve together. By valuing our employees, we will continue to support them and stand by their side.
 



  





**\#RubikUP \#stepUPfuture \#Upjourney**

results.description:

**Your Impact** 




**Non\-life Insurance Transformation Developer team**

 They value being a team, learning from each other and producing together. Since they are excellent teammates, they are proficient in positive interpersonal communication, taking responsibility and valuing different ideas.

* Take initiative within the organization to develop innovative projects by utilizing emerging technologies and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions,

**How do we describe the perfect match?** 



* BS or MS degree in Computer Engineering or Software Engineering,

* Experience in Java technologies (Java, React, Spring Framework, Spring Boot, Sprint Batch, Junit )
* Experience using software development life cycle tools (IntelliJ IDEA, Git, Jenkins, SonarQube)
* Experience in webservices like API, REST, IIB/Layer7 etc.
* Knowledge and experience with monitoring tools such as Dynatrace, Splunk and Kibana
* Knowledge in Object Oriented Programming, Algorithms, Design Patterns, Code Refactoring
* Experience in Oracle Database

* Knowledge of Agile software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies
* Willing to provide 24/7 support to problems that may occur in the systems or applications
* Demonstrated ability to deliver high quality software,
* Fluent in the language, able to understand and review documents in English, and to express yourselves very well in written environments and oral meetings.



 📢 If you would like to get to know more about Garanti BBVA Technology, please follow us on Instagram, LinkedIn, Medium and our Company Website;
 



**https://www.garantibbvateknoloji.com.tr/** 




**https://www.instagram.com/garantibbvateknoloji/** 




**https://www.linkedin.com/company/garanti\-teknoloji/** 




**https://medium.com/@GarantiBBVATeknoloji** 




  





 Çeşitlilik yaklaşımımız
 



 Çeşitliliğin gücüne inanan ve herkesin işe katkısını önemseyen uluslararası yaklaşımları dikkate alıyor, kapsayıcılığın işimizin gelişmesine farklı açılardan katkı sağladığına inanıyoruz. Çeşitliliğin temsil edildiği kuruluşlar başarılarını artırırken, kişilerin kendilerine değer verildiğini hissettiği iş ortamlarında çalışan bağlılığı ve verimliliğinde daha olumlu sonuçlar elde edildiğini görüyoruz. Eşit istihdam sağlamayı görev edinen bir kurum olarak çeşitliliği destekliyoruz.
 



 Çalışanlarımızın mesleki ve kişisel gelişimine fırsat sunan, kendilerini en iyi şekilde göstermelerini sağlayan, gelişimlerine odaklanan işbirlikçi ve kapsayıcı bir çalışma ortamı yaratmak

results.title: Software Engineer 'Generative AI'
results.description:
**About:**




 Yapı Kredi Technology is a technology company that produces innovative, high quality, and high value\-added products and solutions in the finance sector. With more than 2,000 employees, it aims to create products that will shape the sector for Yapı Kredi Bank and to be the undisputed leader in the field of technology by using modern architectural systems and cloud technologies. It also contributes to the development of new and exemplary products for the sector by using natural language processing, machine learning, artificial intelligence, and data mining technologies with its R\&D team.
 



  





**Who We Are:**




 At Yapı Kredi Technology, we research with passion, wonder as we learn, and implement innovations that shape the future together. We take responsibility from the first day with our expert colleagues and work with all our strength for pioneering applications. We make quick decisions and take action. We quickly adapt to innovations and changes.
 



  





**What Do We Offer:**




 📌 Opportunity to work in hybrid model
 



 💻Opportunity to work in Koç Group Community Companies' offices
 



 🌴Chance to discover the natural wonders and amenities offered at Koç Toplululuğu Spor Kulübü (KTSK)
 



 🚀Career development opportunities in a structured technology career path
 



 💫 Opportunity to benefit from BizClub and KoçAilem privileges exclusive to Yapı Kredi Technology employees
 



 🤝Company\-contributed individual retirement insurance
 



 🎂 Birthday off day
 



  





 In Generative AI Department, you will be working closely with other fast\-paced and highly\-skilled R\&D engineers. You are expected to take ML models from R\&D phase and move them to production, scale and maintain them as a software product. As a full\-stack software engineer, you will take a role in each phase of the project, i.e. technical design, prototyping, integration and end\-to\-end testing.
 



  





**Qualifications:**



* Strong understanding of object\-oriented design and programming, especially in Python,
* Experienced knowledge of Python (language/platforms/frameworks),
* Design, develop and maintain scalable backends for GenAI applications using Python, FastAPI, and asynchronous programming,
* Strong understanding of micro\-service architectures,
* Design and implement database architectures for AI\-driven applications,
* Experience with SQL/NoSQL and streaming platforms like Kafka,
* Strong background on performance tuning and monitoring of software systems,
* Hands\-on experience with containerization and orchestration tools (Docker, Kubernetes, Swarm etc.),
* Take ownership and be responsible for refining, coding, testing, and deploying your work in on\-premise and cloud environments,
* Familiarity with source code versioning systems, Git and issue tracking solutions like Jira and Confluence,
* Experience in Linux operating system.



  





**Would be Advantageous:**



* Interest or experience with AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, or other cloud platforms,
* Prior experience with SCRUM/Agile methodologies,
* Experience in building complex chains and agents using frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, Agno,
* Experience with hosting LLMs, inference, and serving frameworks (e.g., vLLM, Triton),
* Experience in implementing and optimizing vector databases (e.g., Qdrant, Milvus, or pgvector) and developing advanced retrieval strategies,
* Experience with dashboard technologies (Kibana, Grafana, etc.),
* Experience with “Guardrails” (e.g., NeMo Guardrails) to ensure PII masking, bias mitigation, and adherence to banking regulations,
* Experience in establishing CI/CD pipelines for models, focusing on automated testing, versioning (e.g., MLflow), and monitoring for hallucinations or model drift.



  





**Candidate Selection Process:**




 Our recruitment process for all positions typically encompasses technical interviews, director assessments, competency evaluations, and personality tests. We will extend our offer to candidates who have successfully completed a positive evaluation process.
 



  





**If you would like to get to know more about Yapı Kredi Technology, you can follow us! 🚀** 




  





 https://www.ykteknoloji.com.tr
 



 https://medium.com/yapi\-kredi\-teknoloji
 



  





 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesinden doğan haklarınıza ve bu konudaki detaylı bilgiye https://kariyerim.yapikredi.com.tr/Account/StaticKvkk adresinde yer alan aydınlatma metnimizden ulaşabilirsiniz

results.description:
**If you have passion for technology as we do and want to be part of a great team which leads innovation in Fintech, join us.** 




  





**Who We Are?** 




**We Create World Class Financial IT Services** 




 We are a leading technology company which provides technology infrastructure, software development, big data and data analytics, internet applications, integration, system management, security management, project management and enterprise applications services to Garanti BBVA branded institutions.
 



 We are an agile team, developing revolutionary and innovative products. We develop emerging financial technologies and end\-to\-end high\-tech solutions with our expert development teams. \#teknolojidekitutkuyukeşfet

 We have a passion for technology, we think big and we continuously explore and seek improvement, we trust the power of empowerment. We are an academy for talents. Thus, we are “one team” and we always achieve together.
 



 The place we call “our office” has no boundaries. We stand for a positive team culture, shared and lived together anywhere.

* Sabbatical leave granted for every seven years at Garanti BBVA Technology.
* In addition to all these, we also meet our teammates in person in regular intervals or whenever we miss each other ❤ either in our İstanbul, Ankara or Izmir offices, which are full of social opportunities and sportive activities.



  





**Your Impact**

 They value being a team, learning from each other and producing together. Since they are excellent teammates, they are proficient in positive interpersonal communication, taking responsibility and valuing different ideas.
 



 They are creative and productive. Their business is based on innovation and is only limited by their dreams. Now they are looking for new teammates with whom they will achieve together.
 



 In that team;

* Take initiative within the organization to develop innovative projects by utilizing emerging technologies and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions,

* Experience using software development life cycle tools (IntelliJ IDEA, Git, Jenkins, SonarQube)
* Experience in webservices like API, REST, IIB/Layer7 etc.

* Knowledge in Object Oriented Programming, Algorithms, Design Patterns, Code Refactoring
* Experience in Oracle Database

* Knowledge of Agile software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies
* Willing to provide 24/7 support to problems that may occur in the systems or applications
* Demonstrated ability to deliver high quality software,
* Fluent in the language, able to understand and review documents in English, and to express yourselves very well in written environments and oral meetings.

results.title: Road to Tech - Staj Programı (3 Ay)
results.description:
🚀 Softtech’le Teknoloji Dünyasına hızlı bir giriş yapabilirsin!
 



  





 🌍 Türkiye’nin öncü teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olarak 2006 yılından bu yana Türkiye ve ABD'de toplam 6 farklı lokasyonda faaliyet göstermekteyiz.
 



  





 🎯 Misyonu, başta Türkiye İş Bankası olmak üzere tüm müşterilerini verimli ve yüksek enerjili ekosistemlerini kullanarak dijital şirketlere dönüştürmektir.
 



  





**Road to Tech Staj Programı ile** 
 teknolojiye yön veren, global çapta ödüllerin sahibi olan çevik ekiplerin parçası olarak çalışma fırsatı yakalarsın. Birlikte gelişmenin gücüne inanıyor ve gençler için tasarladığımız
 **Pupilica Dijital Eğitim Platformumuza** 
 bu yoldaki en büyük destekçin olarak her zaman erişebilirsin.
 



  





**Seni Neler Bekliyor?** 




  




* Öğrenme ve gelişim fırsatlarıyla dolu çevik bir çalışma ortamı
* Teknoloji kariyerinde gerçek projeleri deneyimle imkanı
* Dijital eğitim platformu ile yetkinliklerini geliştirme fırsatı



  





 Bu yolculukta öğrendiklerinden daha fazlasını öğrenebilir, kendini geliştirebilirsin.
 



  





**Başvuru ve Katılım Şartları** 




  




* Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinde 3\. Sınıf veya 4\. Sınıf öğrencisiysen,
* 3 ay boyunca (Haziran\- Eylül 2026 arasında) haftada en az 3 gün staj yapabiliyorsan,
* Teknolojiye yön veren ekiplerin parçası olmak istiyorsan,
* Çevik çalışma dünyasında yer almaktan heyecan duyuyorsan,
* Öğrenme dünyasının merkezinde olmak ve kendini teknoloji alanında geliştirmek istiyorsan sen de başvurunu yapabilirsin!



  





**Değerlendirme Süreci** 




  





 Başvurun detaylı olarak incelendikten sonra belirlenen kriterlere uyum sağlıyorsan;
 


* İlk adım olarak
 **Pupilica** 
 'dan yönlendireceğimiz eğitimi tamamlamanı bekleyeceğiz.
* Sonraki adımımız olan
 **Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni** 
 göndereceğiz.
* Hackerrank Teknik Testi’ni başarıyla tamamlayarak adımı geçtiğinde
 **Öğrenme Çevikliği Envanteri** 
 ile sürecimizle devam ediyoruz.
* Son olarak
 **hem yetkinlik bazlı hem de teknik görüşme** 
 adımına geçerek sürecini tamamlayabileceksin.

results.title: Software Engineer - Machine Learning Group
results.description:
**About the Team** 




 At Trendyol Tech, our mission is to create a positive impact in our ecosystem by enabling commerce through technology.
 



 We solve complex problems with data, creativity, and agility — always driven by real outcomes. With a culture built on learning, collaboration, and ownership, we grow together while building what’s next.
 



  





**About the Role** 




 As a Backend Engineer in the Machine Learning Group, you will build the systems that turn raw data into smart, reliable, and production\-ready features used across our AI models and applications. You’ll design and develop scalable data and backend services that support model training, feature storage, and real\-time inference. Working closely with Data Scientists and other engineers, you’ll ensure our models get high\-quality, consistent inputs that improve performance and enable data\-driven business decisions.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Design and implement robust and scalable backend services using modern software stack.
* Collaborate closely with product managers to ensure seamless integration and meet business requirements.
* Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code.
* Develop well\-designed APIs to interface with frontend services, databases, and other third\-party services.
* Monitor system performance and identify bottlenecks, bugs, and ways to improve backend efficiency and speed.
* Implement security and data protection best practices.
* Conduct code reviews, ensuring high\-quality code.
* Stay updated with current best practices in software development and introduce them to our processes.



  





**Expected Qualifications** 



* 3\+ years of experience in backend development, with a focus on Go, Java, kotlin, .Net etc.
* Strong knowledge of modern programming languages, paradigms, constructs, and idioms.
* Strong understanding of system architecture, object\-oriented design, and design patterns.
* Knowledge of common concurrency and async communication patterns.
* Experience with databases (SQL or NoSQL)
* Experience with working on high volume of data.
* Proficient understanding of code versioning tools, such as Git.
* Knowledge and practical usage of CI/CD pipelines



  





**Nice\-to\-haves** 



* Knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes
* Knowledge of Feature Stores
* Experience on Flink DataStream framework
* ML engineering practices including but not limited to model training, ML pipelines and inference services



  





**What We Offer** 




 A hybrid working model with flexibility —a schedule that helps you find the right balance between flexibility and team bonding, including work\-from\-abroad opportunities and a summer working model.
 



 A customizable FlexBenefits budget — Adjust your daily meal allowance, choose your health insurance package (and extend it to your spouse or children), and pick from additional benefits like fuel support or Trendyol shopping credits.
 



 Comprehensive wellbeing support — Take advantage of our extended health package, which includes annual mini health screenings, access to location\-based in\-house doctors, psychologist and dietitian support, and HPV vaccination coverage.
 



 Personalized training allowance and learning opportunities — Use your annual budget for any training or conference of your choice, explore our Learning Management System (LMS) anytime, and join in\-person learning sessions offered throughout the year.
 



 Responsibility from day one — Take full ownership from the start in a culture where every voice is heard and valued.
 



 A diverse, international team — Collaborate with global peers across our offices in Berlin, Amsterdam, Dubai, and beyond, in a startup\-spirited and collaborative environment.
 



 Opportunities to grow with the best — Tackle meaningful challenges, develop through hands\-on experience, and grow with the support of expert guidance and global mentoring.
 



 Meaningful connections beyond tasks — Be part of team rituals, events, and social activities that help us stay connected and inspired.
 



  





**Take the Next Step** 




 If this role excites you, apply now and let’s take the next step together.
 



 Want to get to know the team better first? Explore our Career Website, LinkedIn, or YouTube to learn more about \#LifeatTrendyol and how we work.

 At Trendyol Tech, our mission is to create a positive impact in our ecosystem by enabling commerce through technology.

 As a core member of our CV \& NLP team, you will play a pivotal role in building intelligent, scalable systems that power the next generation of our mobile commerce products. You will move beyond traditional models to explore multimodal architectures—blending vision and language to solve complex challenges in image search, recommendation, product tagging and catalog quality improvement. **About the Role** 




 We are looking for a backend\-focused Full\-Stack Software Engineer to join our data platform team.
 



  





 Our team develops and maintains an internal platform that enables domain teams across the organization to create, manage and monitor data products used for analytics and business insights. The platform provides services, APIs and user interfaces that simplify how teams interact with data assets and platform capabilities.
 



  





 In this role, you will primarily contribute to the backend services of the platform, while occasionally supporting front\-end development when needed. You will work on systems that power data product lifecycle management, platform APIs, monitoring and catalog capabilities.
 



  





 The role requires a strong backend engineering skills and experience building scalable systems. While experience with data platforms or data pipelines is a plus, it is not mandatory. Engineers with strong backend backgrounds who are interested in learning about data\-driven systems and platform engineering are encouraged to apply.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Design, develop and maintain backend services powering the Data Platform.
* Build and evolve microservices following scalable architecture and clean code principles.
* Design and implement RESTful APIs used by internal platform tools and services.
* Contribute to frontend components when needed using modern frameworks.
* Develop features supporting data product management, monitoring and platform capabilities.

* Ensure platform services are scalable, reliable and production ready.

 Node.js

 At Trendyol Tech, our mission is to create a positive impact in our ecosystem by enabling commerce through technology.

**What We Offer** 




**\- Hybrid working model with flexibility:** 
 a schedule that helps you find the right balance between flexibility and team bonding, including work\-from\-abroad opportunities and a summer working model.
 



**\- Customisable FlexBenefits budget:** 
 Adjust your daily meal allowance, choose your health insurance package (and extend it to your spouse or children), and pick from additional benefits like fuel support or Trendyol shopping credits.
 



**\- Well\-being support:** 
 Access to location\-based in\-house doctors, as well as psychologist and dietitian support, and HPV vaccination provision.
 



**\- Personalised training allowance and learning opportunities:** 
 Use your annual budget for any training or conference of your choice, explore our Learning Management System (LMS) anytime, and join in\-person learning sessions offered throughout the year.
 



**\- Responsibility from day one:** 
 Take full ownership from the start in a culture where every voice is heard and valued.
 



**\- A diverse, international team:** 
 Collaborate with global peers across our offices in Berlin, Amsterdam, Dubai, and beyond, in a startup\-spirited and collaborative environment.
 



**\- Opportunities to grow with the best:** 
 Tackle meaningful challenges, develop through hands\-on experience, and grow with the support of expert guidance and global mentoring.
 



**\- Meaningful connections beyond tasks:** 
 Be part of team rituals, events, and social activities that help us stay connected and inspired.
 



  





**Take the Next Step** 




 If this role excites you, apply today, we look forward to taking the next step with you.
 



 Want to get to know the team better first? Explore our Career Website, LinkedIn, or YouTube to learn more about \#LifeatTrendyol and how we work.
